projects.titleZh: AI 模型部署與監控平台
projects.oneLinerZh: 為 YOLOv8 系列模型打造的端到端部署平台:自動化 PT→ONNX→TensorRT 優化、多批次多精度效能評測,並以 Triton 推論服務與 Prometheus/Grafana 即時監控串起完整生命週期。
projects.oneLinerEn: An end-to-end deployment platform for YOLOv8 models: automated PT→ONNX→TensorRT optimization, multi-batch/multi-precision benchmarking, and a full lifecycle wired to Triton inference serving with real-time Prometheus/Grafana monitoring.
projects.descZh: 本專案是一套針對 YOLOv8 系列模型的 AI 部署與效能監控平台,涵蓋模型上傳、格式轉換、自動化評測到生產級推論服務的完整流程。後端以 FastAPI 非同步服務組織,透過 ultralytics 與 trtexec 把 PyTorch 模型自動轉為 ONNX 與 TensorRT 引擎(支援 FP32/FP16),並交由 NVIDIA Triton Inference Server 以 explicit 模式動態掛載/卸載部署。自動化管線會針對多種批次大小(1–32)與精度組合反覆推論測量,同時記錄 mAP50/mAP50-95 準確度與延遲、FPS、GPU 使用率、VRAM 等效能指標。前端為 React + Ant Design 介面,提供互動式圖表與 PDF/Excel 報告匯出;系統層則以 Prometheus + node/GPU exporter 蒐集指標、Grafana 視覺化,全部以 Docker Compose 編排為單一可啟動的 GPU 容器堆疊。
projects.descEn: An AI deployment and performance-monitoring platform built around the YOLOv8 model family, spanning the full path from model upload and format conversion through automated benchmarking to production inference serving. The FastAPI async backend uses ultralytics and trtexec to convert PyTorch models into ONNX and TensorRT engines (FP32/FP16), then deploys them on NVIDIA Triton Inference Server in explicit mode with dynamic load/unload. An automated pipeline runs repeated inference across batch sizes (1–32) and precision combinations, capturing both accuracy (mAP50 / mAP50-95) and performance metrics (latency, FPS, GPU utilization, VRAM). The React + Ant Design frontend offers interactive charts and PDF/Excel report export, while a Prometheus + node/GPU-exporter + Grafana stack provides real-time system observability — all orchestrated as a single GPU-enabled Docker Compose stack.

highlights.zh: 自動化模型優化管線:以 ultralytics 與 trtexec 完成 PT→ONNX→TensorRT 轉換,並對批次大小 1–32 × FP32/FP16 組合各做 100 次重複推論,同時量測 mAP50/mAP50-95 準確度與延遲、FPS、GPU 使用率、VRAM,並輸出平均值與標準差以評估穩定性。
highlights.en: An automated optimization pipeline that converts PT→ONNX→TensorRT via ultralytics and trtexec, then runs 100 repeated inferences for each batch-size (1–32) × precision (FP32/FP16) combination, measuring both mAP50/mAP50-95 accuracy and latency, FPS, GPU utilization, and VRAM — reporting mean and standard deviation to gauge stability.

highlights.zh: 以 NVIDIA Triton Inference Server(explicit model-control 模式)提供生產級推論,支援模型動態掛載/卸載與即時推論統計;結果分析頁可多維度比較不同精度與批次配置,並匯出 PDF/Excel 報告作為選型與硬體規劃依據。
highlights.en: Production-grade serving on NVIDIA Triton Inference Server (explicit model-control mode) with dynamic model load/unload and live inference stats; the analysis page compares precision and batch configurations across multiple dimensions and exports PDF/Excel reports to inform model selection and hardware planning.

highlights.zh: 設計清晰分層的服務架構:FastAPI 非同步後端(轉換/推論/評測/Triton 各自獨立 service 與 router)+ React/Ant Design 前端 + NVIDIA 推論堆疊,職責邊界明確,易於擴充與除錯。
highlights.en: A cleanly layered service architecture: an async FastAPI backend (separate services and routers for conversion, inference, benchmarking, and Triton) plus a React/Ant Design frontend and the NVIDIA inference stack, with clear responsibility boundaries that keep it extensible and debuggable.

highlights.zh: 完整可觀測性堆疊:Prometheus 搭配 node-exporter 與 nvidia-gpu-exporter 蒐集 CPU/記憶體/GPU 負載/VRAM 指標,Grafana 5 秒刷新視覺化儀表板,整套系統以 Docker Compose 一鍵編排成 GPU 容器堆疊。
highlights.en: A complete observability stack: Prometheus with node-exporter and nvidia-gpu-exporter collecting CPU/memory/GPU-load/VRAM metrics, Grafana dashboards refreshing every 5 seconds, with the whole system orchestrated as a one-command GPU Docker Compose stack.

projects.challengesZh: 最大的取捨在於「真實效能可比較性」與「工程複雜度」之間的平衡。為了讓評測結果可信,管線採固定基準(YOLOv8n-Pose、COCO 2017-pose val)、每組配置重複 100 次並記錄標準差,還要求驗證集張數能被所有批次大小整除以避免尾批失真,這對測試設計的嚴謹度要求很高。技術整合上,PT→ONNX→TensorRT 跨多套工具鏈(ultralytics/onnx-simplifier/trtexec)、不同 CUDA/TensorRT 版本與 FP16 硬體支援差異,都是常見破口;推論服務改用 Triton explicit 模式以支援動態載入/卸載,但也需要自行管理模型庫掛載與 GPU 記憶體釋放(程式中可見 torch/gc 與多種 GPU 記憶體量測備援)。此外平台刻意採檔案式 JSON 持久化而非資料庫,降低部署門檻、貼合單機 GPU 評測情境,代價是放棄並發寫入與查詢能力,屬有意識的範圍取捨。整套需 NVIDIA GPU 與 CUDA 環境,並以 Docker Compose 編排多容器(後端/前端/Triton/Prometheus/Grafana/exporters)協調啟動順序與資源限制。
projects.challengesEn: The central trade-off was balancing trustworthy, comparable performance numbers against engineering complexity. To make results credible, the pipeline fixes a baseline (YOLOv8n-Pose on COCO 2017-pose val), repeats each configuration 100 times while recording standard deviation, and requires the validation set size to be divisible by every batch size to avoid tail-batch distortion — demanding rigor in test design. On integration, the PT→ONNX→TensorRT path spans several toolchains (ultralytics, onnx-simplifier, trtexec) where CUDA/TensorRT version mismatches and differing FP16 hardware support are common breakage points; serving was moved to Triton's explicit mode for dynamic load/unload, which in turn required hand-managing the model repository mount and GPU memory release (the code shows torch/gc handling and several fallback paths for measuring GPU memory). The platform also deliberately uses file-based JSON persistence instead of a database, lowering the deployment barrier and fitting a single-machine GPU benchmarking scenario — at the conscious cost of concurrent writes and query capability. The whole system requires an NVIDIA GPU and CUDA, and is orchestrated via Docker Compose across multiple containers (backend, frontend, Triton, Prometheus, Grafana, exporters) with managed startup order and resource limits.

demoFeasibility.notes: 無法作為瀏覽器 live demo。前端為 React/CRA SPA,核心功能(模型轉換、Triton 推論、效能評測、即時監控)全部依賴需要 NVIDIA GPU + CUDA + TensorRT + Triton 的 FastAPI 後端,屬硬體相依的本機/伺服器系統。public/ 內雖有 sample_performance_data.json,但其餘頁面均向後端 API 取資料,純前端靜態部署只會呈現空殼,無法展示真正價值。建議改以系統展示影片(README 內已附 YouTube 解說)、Grafana 儀表板與評測報告截圖呈現。

projects.titleZh: LOL Helper — Arena / Mayhem 統計平台
projects.titleEn: LOL Helper — Arena / Mayhem Stats Platform
projects.oneLinerZh: OP.GG 風格的英雄聯盟 Arena / Mayhem 統計平台,自建 Riot API 爬蟲與 Wilson 信心區間排行引擎。
projects.oneLinerEn: OP.GG-style LoL Arena / Mayhem stats platform with a self-built Riot API crawler and a Wilson-interval ranking engine.
projects.descZh: 針對英雄聯盟「競技場 Arena」與「海克斯大亂鬥 Mayhem」兩個模式的統計平台,pnpm + Turbo monorepo 架構,含 FastAPI 後端、Next.js 15 前端與 Electron 桌面端三個元件。後端以非同步 Python(SQLAlchemy 2 async + asyncpg + ARQ)實作 Match-V5 BFS 爬蟲,自寫雙層滑動視窗 token bucket 處理 Riot 速率限制,並以 Wilson 95% 信心區間下界作為排行指標、再依百分位指派 S/A/B/C/D 分級,避免小樣本灌水。前端走 App Router 提供 SEO 與 OP.GG 風英雄頁(augment / 裝備 / 核心組建 / 隊友搭配排行),全程 zh_tw 中文化。
projects.descEn: A statistics platform for League of Legends' Arena and Mayhem modes, built as a pnpm + Turbo monorepo spanning a FastAPI backend, a Next.js 15 frontend, and an Electron desktop client. The async-Python backend (SQLAlchemy 2 async + asyncpg + ARQ) runs a Match-V5 BFS crawler with a hand-written two-tier sliding-window token-bucket rate limiter for the Riot API, and ranks augments/items by the lower bound of a 95% Wilson confidence interval before assigning percentile-based S/A/B/C/D tiers — so small-sample 100% win rates don't outrank high-volume 80%. The App Router frontend serves SEO-friendly, OP.GG-style champion pages (augment / item / core-build / synergy rankings), fully localized to zh_tw.

highlights.zh: 自寫雙層滑動視窗 token bucket 速率限制器,同時管理 App 層(20/s + 100/120s)與 per-method × per-region 兩種 Riot 限速,BFS 爬蟲跨 4 個 region cluster 並行,單一 personal key 可達約 5 萬場/日。
highlights.en: Hand-written two-tier sliding-window token-bucket limiter that tracks both Riot's app budget (20/s + 100/120s) and per-method-per-region limits; the BFS crawler runs across 4 region clusters in parallel, reaching ~50k matches/day on a single personal key.

highlights.zh: 以 Wilson 95% 信心區間下界作為排行指標,搭配百分位分級(S/A/B/C/D),解決『5/5=100% 勝率灌爆 800/1000=80%』的小樣本問題;設計取捨記錄於 ADR(對比 Bayesian shrinkage、min-sample 門檻等替代方案)。
highlights.en: Ranks by the Wilson 95% confidence-interval lower bound plus percentile tiering (S/A/B/C/D), fixing the small-sample problem where 5/5 (100%) outranks 800/1000 (80%); the trade-off vs. Bayesian shrinkage and min-sample thresholds is documented in an ADR.

highlights.zh: 非同步資料管線:ARQ cron 依優先級與時效性派發爬取任務(SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED 確保冪等),聚合層以原生 SQL UPSERT 在分割表(Alembic 分區 migration)上重算 augment / item 統計。
highlights.en: Async data pipeline: ARQ cron dispatches crawl jobs by priority and staleness (idempotent via SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED), and the aggregation layer recomputes augment/item stats with raw-SQL UPSERTs over a partitioned participants table (Alembic partition migrations).

highlights.zh: 產品決策有真實洞察:因 Riot 永久封鎖 Mayhem/Brawl 的 Match-V5 API(連 OP.GG 都拿不到),規劃以 Electron 客戶端讀本機 LCU 上傳資料聚合,並另立 tos-compliance 文件逐項對應 Riot 第三方政策邊界。
highlights.en: Grounded product insight: because Riot permanently blocked Match-V5 for Mayhem/Brawl (even OP.GG can't fetch it), the roadmap pivots to an Electron client that aggregates data uploaded from each user's local LCU, with a dedicated tos-compliance doc mapping every feature to Riot's third-party policy.

projects.challengesZh: 最大難點是在 Riot personal key 嚴苛速率限制下,跨 region 高吞吐且不被封鎖地爬取資料 —— 解法是自寫複合滑動視窗 token bucket(以 asyncio.Lock 保護、計算各視窗 time_until_available 取最大值),並讓爬蟲依 region cluster 並行。第二是統計排行的公平性:刻意捨棄直覺的原始勝率,選用 Wilson 區間下界,並把『為何不用 Bayesian / Elo / min-sample』的取捨寫進 ADR。架構面的取捨包括選 ARQ 而非 Celery(輕量、async 原生)、聚合先用原生 SQL UPSERT 全量重算(MVP 階段夠快,留待資料成長後改增量),以及為被封鎖的 Mayhem 模式從「網站爬蟲」改採「本機 LCU 上傳」的資料來源策略,並主動處理對應的政策合規風險。
projects.challengesEn: The core challenge was achieving high cross-region crawl throughput under Riot's strict personal-key limits without getting throttled — solved with a custom composite sliding-window token bucket (guarded by an asyncio.Lock, taking the max time_until_available across windows) and a crawler parallelized per region cluster. The second was ranking fairness: deliberately rejecting raw win rate in favor of the Wilson interval lower bound, with the rationale for not using Bayesian shrinkage, Elo, or a bare min-sample threshold captured in an ADR. Architectural trade-offs include choosing ARQ over Celery (lighter, async-native), doing full-recompute raw-SQL UPSERT aggregation for the MVP (fast enough now, leaving incremental aggregation for later), and pivoting the data source for the API-blocked Mayhem mode from web crawling to local LCU upload — while proactively addressing the resulting policy-compliance risk.

demoFeasibility.notes: 前端為 Next.js 15(App Router),但完全依賴 FastAPI 後端 API(NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL),而後端需 PostgreSQL + Redis,且有意義的資料來自需長時間運行的 Riot Match-V5 爬蟲與聚合 worker。沒有後端與已爬取資料庫時頁面無內容,故不適合作為純前端 live demo。若要做 live demo,需提供帶 mock 資料的後端或預先 seed 的資料庫快照,並以 docker-compose 一併部署 —— 工程量不小,建議以截圖/錄影的 showcase 呈現,而非 live demo。

projects.titleZh: MCP 流量觀測與安全代理 mcpglass
projects.oneLinerZh: MCP 流量的 Wireshark＋防火牆——單一 Rust binary 透明代理,坐在 AI client(Claude Code/Cursor…)與 MCP server 之間:錄下每一幀 JSON-RPC、偵測工具描述被偷改的 rug-pull 與外流密鑰、估算工具 schema 的 context 成本,還能重放請求與注入故障;fail-open 鐵律保證代理自身故障絕不阻斷流量,資料 100% 留本機。
projects.oneLinerEn: Wireshark + firewall for MCP traffic — a transparent proxy in a single Rust binary between any AI client (Claude Code, Cursor, ...) and your MCP servers: it records every JSON-RPC frame, catches rug-pulls (silently rewritten tool descriptions) and leaking secrets, prices what each server's tool schemas cost in context, and can replay requests or inject faults; a fail-open iron law guarantees the proxy's own failures never block traffic, and all data stays 100% local.
projects.descZh: 開源(Apache-2.0)的 MCP(Model Context Protocol)觀測與安全代理。動機:官方 MCP Inspector 是旁路測試工具,看不到真實 client↔server 對話;MCP server 可以在你核准後偷改工具描述(rug-pull);而每個 server 的工具 schema 吃掉多少 context window 無人知曉。mcpglass attach 一鍵改寫 Claude Code/Claude Desktop/Cursor 的設定檔(原子寫入+時間戳備份+detach 可還原),stdio server 包進 wrap 透明代理、url server 改指本機 gateway;兩種 transport(stdio 與 Streamable HTTP,對齊 spec 2025-06-18,SSE 逐 chunk 直通並旁路切分記錄)共用同一條 tap→SQLite→dashboard 管線。儀表板是 axum + rust-embed 內嵌的 React:session 時間軸、payload 檢視器、per-method latency,與 Security/Context/Inject 三個專屬分頁。安全層預設 monitor 只觀察告警,enforce 為 opt-in 且以協定內 -32001 合法拒絕、絕不粗暴斷線:tool 指紋(自實作 canonical-JSON SHA-256,以 server 啟動指令為跨 session 身分)抓 rug-pull 與 A→B→A 震盪,secret 偵測內建 AWS/GitHub/OpenAI/Anthropic 等 pattern 並支援自訂 regex。除錯工具箱:context bloat 估算(fat tool 排名與裁剪建議)、帶外 replay(重 spawn server/重 initialize 新 session,絕不落庫)、故障注入(delay/error/drop/truncate,可設機率與觸發上限,用於測試 client/server 韌性)。207 項 Rust 測試(含 bytes 完全一致的 passthrough 整合測試)、clippy -D warnings、Ubuntu+Windows 雙 OS CI;並誠實揭露:SQLite 存原始流量全文(含流經的密鑰)——這是流量記錄器的本質,資料不出本機,遮罩只做在稽核視圖。
projects.descEn: An open-source (Apache-2.0) observability and security proxy for MCP (Model Context Protocol). The itch: the official MCP Inspector is a side-channel test harness that can't see the real client-server conversation; an MCP server can silently rewrite a tool description after you approved it (a rug-pull); and nobody knows how much context window each server's tool schemas eat. mcpglass attach rewrites Claude Code / Claude Desktop / Cursor configs in one command (atomic writes, timestamped backups, detach restores): stdio servers get wrapped by a transparent proxy, url servers get repointed at a local gateway; both transports (stdio and Streamable HTTP per spec 2025-06-18, with SSE streamed through chunk-by-chunk and split for recording on the side) share one tap → SQLite → dashboard pipeline. The dashboard is an axum server with a rust-embed'ed React frontend: session timelines, a payload inspector, per-method latency, and dedicated Security / Context / Inject tabs. The security layer defaults to monitor (observe and flag only); enforce is opt-in and refuses calls with a legal in-protocol -32001 JSON-RPC error instead of severing the connection: tool fingerprints (hand-rolled canonical-JSON SHA-256, keyed to the server's launch command as its cross-session identity) catch rug-pulls including A-B-A oscillations, and secret detection ships AWS/GitHub/OpenAI/Anthropic patterns plus custom regexes. The debugging toolbox adds context-bloat estimation (fattest-tool ranking and trim hints), out-of-band replay (re-spawns the server or re-initializes a fresh HTTP session; never recorded), and fault injection (delay/error/drop/truncate with probabilities and trigger caps) for resilience testing. 207 Rust tests (including a byte-exact passthrough integration test), clippy -D warnings, and Ubuntu+Windows CI; with honest disclosure: the SQLite file stores full raw traffic verbatim (secrets included) — that is the nature of a traffic recorder, the data never leaves the machine, and masking applies to the audit view only.

highlights.zh: fail-open 鐵律架構:代理自身任何錯誤(解析失敗、DB 寫入失敗、policy panic)都不得阻斷或延遲 client↔server 流量——s2c 方向是「先轉發、後記錄」的旁路 tap,c2s 方向是同步純函式決策;記錄通道 try_send 不施加背壓、channel 滿時日誌節流避免故障態的同步 I/O 回壓 wire,底線由 bytes 完全一致的 passthrough 整合測試守住。
highlights.en: A fail-open iron law: no failure inside the proxy (parse errors, DB write failures, a panicking policy engine) may ever block or delay client-server traffic — server-to-client is a forward-first side-channel tap, client-to-server a synchronous pure-function decision; the recording channel uses non-blocking try_send with log throttling when full so a failing state never back-pressures the wire, and the floor is held by a byte-exact passthrough integration test.

highlights.zh: MCP 供應鏈安全:tools/list 回應以自實作的 canonical-JSON key 排序 SHA-256 指紋,綁 server 啟動指令為跨 session 身分,抓「核准後偷改工具描述」的 rug-pull(含 A→B→A 震盪偵測);secret 外流偵測內建八家密鑰 pattern;預設 monitor 不阻擋,enforce 命中時合成協定內 -32001 錯誤回 client——是合法拒絕,不是斷線。
highlights.en: MCP supply-chain security: tools/list responses are fingerprinted with a hand-rolled canonical-JSON key-sorted SHA-256, keyed to the server's launch command as its cross-session identity, catching post-approval rug-pulls (including A-B-A oscillations); secret-leak detection ships eight built-in credential patterns; monitor mode never blocks, and an enforce hit answers the client with a synthesized in-protocol -32001 error — a legal refusal, not a dropped connection.

highlights.zh: 兩種 transport、一條管線:stdio wrap 與 Streamable HTTP gateway(SSE 逐 chunk 直通+旁路切分、非 SSE 回應緩衝上限、Origin+Host 雙重 loopback 驗證防 DNS rebinding/CSRF-to-localhost)共用同一 tap/storage/指紋管線;attach 一鍵改寫三家 client 設定檔,原子寫入+備份+冪等+detach 精確還原,url server 的原始 upstream 記在 gateway.toml 作唯一真相。
highlights.en: Two transports, one pipeline: the stdio wrap and the Streamable HTTP gateway (SSE streamed through chunk-by-chunk with side-channel splitting, capped buffering for non-SSE responses, and dual Origin+Host loopback validation against DNS rebinding / CSRF-to-localhost) share the same tap/storage/fingerprint pipeline; attach rewrites all three clients' configs with atomic writes, backups, idempotency and exact detach restoration, recording each url server's original upstream in gateway.toml as the single source of truth.

highlights.zh: 從觀測到干預的完整除錯工具箱:context bloat 分析估算每個 server 的工具 schema 吃掉多少 token(fat tool 排名+裁剪建議,誠實標示為啟發式估算);帶外 replay 重放任一歷史請求(重 spawn/重 initialize,唯讀開庫、絕不落庫);故障注入以 TOML 規則對活流量模擬 delay/error/drop/truncate(機率+觸發上限),注入層自身仍 fail-open;三者都有對應的儀表板分頁,demo 與 README GIF 皆由 repo 內腳本全自動重現。
highlights.en: A full observe-to-intervene debugging toolbox: context-bloat analysis estimates what each server's tool schemas cost in tokens (fattest-tool ranking plus trim hints, honestly labelled as a heuristic); out-of-band replay re-sends any recorded request (re-spawn / re-initialize, read-only DB access, never recorded); fault injection simulates delay/error/drop/truncate on live traffic via TOML rules (probabilities plus trigger caps) with the injection machinery itself still failing open — each with its own dashboard tab, and both the demo and the README GIF are fully script-reproducible from the repo.

projects.challengesZh: 核心矛盾是「要攔截又絕不能擋路」:安全層需要在 wire 上做決策,fail-open 鐵律卻要求代理故障零影響。解法是嚴格分向——c2s 走同步純函式決策(panic 由 catch_unwind 保底放行),s2c 維持純旁路 tap 只告警不阻擋;enforce 的拒絕做成協定內合法的 -32001 錯誤而非斷線,fail-open 只留三個明確例外(啟動期設定載入失敗、enforce 明確命中、使用者要求的故障注入)。第二個坑是指紋穩定性:Cargo workspace 的 feature 統一會讓 serde_json 的 preserve_order 悄悄開啟,同一份工具定義序列化出不同 key 順序、指紋直接失穩,於是自己實作 canonical JSON(遞迴 key 排序)再雜湊,不信任序列化器的預設行為。第三是誠實的代價:流量記錄器天生要存原始明文(含密鑰),與其假裝遮罩得掉,不如在 README/SECURITY.md 大聲揭露「資料不出本機、但 sessions.db 請當機密檔案對待」,遮罩只承諾在稽核視圖。開發流程本身也是實驗:全程以多代理 pipeline(規劃→分層派工→Opus+Codex 雙重審查→逐條裁決)推進,連 CI 的 Linux 限定測試 port 競態,都是靠把 free_port 先占先放改成 --port 0 由 OS 配號+解析啟動 banner 才根治。
projects.challengesEn: The core contradiction: intercept without ever standing in the way. The security layer must decide on the wire, yet the fail-open iron law demands zero impact from proxy failures. The answer is strict directionality — client-to-server runs a synchronous pure-function decision (panics caught and forwarded via catch_unwind), server-to-client stays a pure side-tap that alerts but never blocks; an enforce refusal is a legal in-protocol -32001 error rather than a severed connection, and fail-open keeps exactly three deliberate exceptions (config load failure at startup, an explicit enforce hit, and user-requested fault injection). The second pit was fingerprint stability: Cargo workspace feature unification silently enables serde_json's preserve_order, so the same tool definition can serialize with different key orders and destabilize every fingerprint — hence a hand-rolled canonical JSON (recursive key sort) before hashing, trusting no serializer defaults. Third, the price of honesty: a traffic recorder inherently stores raw plaintext (secrets included), so instead of pretending to mask it, the README and SECURITY.md disclose loudly that data never leaves the machine but sessions.db must be treated as sensitive, with masking promised only in the audit view. The development process was itself an experiment — a multi-agent pipeline (plan → tiered delegation → dual Opus+Codex review → per-finding adjudication) end to end; even the Linux-only CI port race in the gateway tests was only truly fixed by replacing bind-and-release free_port with --port 0 OS assignment plus parsing the startup banner.

demoFeasibility.notes: CLI+本機儀表板工具,非網頁應用:需從原始碼建置(Rust 1.80+ 與 pnpm,前端先 build 再 cargo build 以內嵌真 UI),attach 後配合任一 MCP client 即可觀測真實流量。repo 附 scripts/demo.ps1 可在沒有 AI client 的情況下自動產生真實 MCP 流量(對官方 filesystem server 跑兩輪:乾淨+故障注入)並開 dashboard 觀看;README 的 demo GIF 亦由 repo 內 CDP 工具鏈(scripts/record-gif/)全自動錄製。Windows 實測通過,Ubuntu+Windows CI 全綠,macOS 未實測。

projects.oneLinerZh: 用原生 HTML5 Canvas、零依賴零建置打造的像素風 roguelike 生存遊戲,美術 100% 程式即時生成,並可選配雲端帳號與 1~3 人即時連線合作。
projects.oneLinerEn: A pixel-art roguelike survival game built on raw HTML5 Canvas with zero dependencies and zero build step — 100% procedurally generated art, plus optional cloud accounts and 1–3 player real-time co-op.
projects.descZh: Vampire-Survivors-like 的瀏覽器生存遊戲,以純 ES Modules + HTML5 Canvas 自製引擎(120 Hz 固定步模擬、相機/世界座標系、程序化像素繪圖 API、WebAudio 合成),不含任何外部圖片素材與第三方前端框架。內容完全資料驅動並經統一註冊表整合,規模達 63 敵人 / 27 角色 / 43 武器 / 10 生態系,大量內容透過自製 multi-agent workflow(生成 → 對抗式審查 → 自動整合、故障隔離)量產。採離線優先:雲端與多人皆為選配,未登入或連不上自動退回本機存檔。選配後端為 Node + Fastify + PostgreSQL,提供帳號、跨裝置雲端存檔、伺服器權威排行榜,以及主機權威中繼(host-authoritative relay)的即時合作。
projects.descEn: A Vampire-Survivors-like browser survival game running on a hand-rolled engine of pure ES Modules + HTML5 Canvas — a 120 Hz fixed-step simulation, a camera/world coordinate system, a procedural pixel-drawing API, and WebAudio synthesis — with no external image assets and no third-party frontend framework. Content is fully data-driven through a single registry (63 enemies / 27 characters / 43 weapons / 10 biomes), much of it mass-produced via a custom multi-agent workflow (generate → adversarial review → auto-integrate with fault isolation). It is offline-first: cloud and multiplayer are optional, and the game silently falls back to local saves when logged out or disconnected. The optional backend (Node + Fastify + PostgreSQL) provides accounts, cross-device cloud saves, a server-authoritative leaderboard, and host-authoritative relay real-time co-op.

highlights.zh: 從零自製遊戲引擎:120 Hz 固定步主迴圈降低輸入延遲、自寫相機與世界↔螢幕座標轉換、純程式繪製的像素 sprite 系統(rasterise 後快取),連音效都以 WebAudio 即時合成。
highlights.en: A from-scratch game engine: a 120 Hz fixed-step main loop for low input latency, a hand-written camera and world-to-screen transform, a code-only pixel sprite system (rasterised then cached), and even sound effects synthesized live via WebAudio.

highlights.zh: 伺服器權威排行榜:後端依 kills/stage/time/difficulty/reaper 重算分數並忽略客戶端宣稱值,搭配逐欄位上限與「依存活時間推算的合理性閘門」反作弊(如擊殺數受時間上限約束、無盡模式不可能觸發破關或死神),從源頭杜絕分數灌水。
highlights.en: Server-authoritative leaderboard: the backend recomputes each score from kills/stage/time/difficulty/reaper and ignores the client's claimed value, backed by per-field caps and time-derived plausibility gates (e.g. kills bounded by elapsed time, endless runs can never trigger a clear or the Reaper) — making score inflation impossible by construction.

highlights.zh: 主機權威中繼的 1~3 人即時合作:開房玩家瀏覽器跑權威模擬並以 ~18Hz 廣播量化後的世界快照,Node 伺服器只當房間/中繼不跑模擬;單一 protocol.js 同時擁有編碼與解碼以防漂移,並對未信任的 host 資料做夾擠防範記憶體攻擊。單機路徑完全不受影響。
highlights.en: Host-authoritative relay co-op for 1–3 players: the host's browser runs the authoritative simulation and broadcasts quantised world snapshots at ~18 Hz, while the Node server acts purely as room/relay and never simulates. A single protocol.js owns both encode and decode to prevent drift, and clamps untrusted host data to guard against memory attacks — the single-player path is left entirely unchanged.

highlights.zh: 自製 multi-agent 內容生產流水線:以「生成 → 對抗式審查 → 自動整合」量產敵人/武器/角色/美術,整合工具掃描 gen 目錄重建索引、保留既有 pack 並做故障隔離,讓單機在零依賴前提下仍堆出 63 敵人、43 武器、27 角色、10 生態系的內容規模。
highlights.en: A custom multi-agent content pipeline: enemies, weapons, characters, and art are mass-produced via generate → adversarial review → auto-integrate, with an integration tool that rebuilds indexes by scanning the gen directory, preserves prior packs, and isolates faults — letting a zero-dependency single-player game scale to 63 enemies, 43 weapons, 27 characters, and 10 biomes.

projects.challengesZh: 最大的取捨是堅持「零依賴、零建置、原生 Canvas」,代價是引擎層(固定步迴圈、座標系、粒子、音訊、程序化繪圖 API)全得自己寫,但換來極小的部署面與長期可維護性。即時連線在「簡單」與「防作弊」之間選擇主機權威中繼:伺服器不跑模擬以保持輕量,代價是信任開房者,因此另用伺服器權威排行榜(重算分數 + 合理性閘門)守住公平性,並把編/解碼集中在單一 protocol.js 避免兩端漂移、對未信任資料夾擠以防記憶體攻擊。內容要做大又不能拖垮專案,於是用 multi-agent workflow 量產並以掃描式整合 + 故障隔離吸收生成內容的不穩定。整體以離線優先為紅線:雲端/多人全為選配,任何網路失敗都不能影響本機遊玩。
projects.challengesEn: The biggest trade-off was committing to "zero dependencies, zero build, raw Canvas": the price is hand-writing the entire engine layer (fixed-step loop, coordinate system, particles, audio, procedural drawing API), but the payoff is a tiny deployment surface and long-term maintainability. Real-time multiplayer chose host-authoritative relay between "simple" and "cheat-proof": keeping the server out of simulation makes it lightweight at the cost of trusting the host, so fairness is instead enforced by a server-authoritative leaderboard (recomputed scores plus plausibility gates), with encode/decode centralised in a single protocol.js to avoid client/host drift and untrusted data clamped against memory attacks. Scaling content without bloating the project led to a multi-agent generation workflow absorbed via scan-based integration and fault isolation. Throughout, offline-first was the hard line: cloud and multiplayer are strictly optional, and no network failure may ever affect local play.

demoFeasibility.notes: 前端為純 ES Modules + HTML5 Canvas,可純單機離線遊玩、無需建置(只需任一靜態伺服器,repo 內附 tools/serve.mjs)。雲端帳號、跨裝置存檔、排行榜與 1~3 人連線皆為選配,未登入或連不上會自動退回本機 localStorage 存檔,不影響核心遊玩。因此前端可獨立靜態部署,可作為候選 live demo(實際上已部署於 https://yeyesoulshard.duckdns.org/,並有 GitHub Actions push 到 main 自動部署至 Oracle Cloud + HTTPS)。完整體驗多人/排行榜需另跑 Node + Fastify + PostgreSQL 後端(docker compose 一鍵起)。

projects.oneLinerZh: 自建並已上線的 Steam 特價追蹤站——SteamDB 風的特價榜 + 自建價格歷史 + Discord 降價通知:免登入即可瀏覽特價與免費遊戲,Discord 登入後解鎖跨裝置願望清單與目標價提醒。
projects.oneLinerEn: A self-built, live-deployed Steam deals tracker — a SteamDB-style sale board with its own price history and Discord price alerts: browse deals and free games without an account, or log in with Discord to unlock a cross-device wishlist and target-price alerts.
projects.descZh: 一套自建的 Steam 特價追蹤站,定位在「SteamDB 風的特價榜 + 自建價格歷史 + Discord 通知」。後端 worker(Node + TypeScript、cron 約每 30 分)在 server 端呼叫 Steam 官方商店端點(featuredcategories / appdetails / 特價搜尋,免金鑰、台灣區 cc=tw)與 GamerPower(永久入庫的免費遊戲/DLC),把每輪台幣價寫進 SQLite 累積成「本站追蹤以來」的價格走勢與史低(observed low),再烤成 deals / free / meta 三份靜態 JSON;可選配 IsThereAnyDeal API 以真實台幣史低校正冷啟動初值。前端是 Astro 靜態站(深色電競風、繁中/英 i18n、深淺主題、PWA),提供可排序列表與卡片雙檢視、列內價格走勢 sparkline、Steam 評價、特價即時倒數、即將結束與免費領取專區,以及每款的商品詳細頁(自建歷史走勢圖)。登入子系統採 Discord OAuth:收藏跨裝置同步(未登入用 localStorage、登入後合併)、每款可設目標價,創本站新低或跌破目標時由 Discord bot 在你的頻道 @你或私訊提醒,並有 per-user 通知偏好(降價/免費/每日每週摘要/只收特定類型/頻道 vs DM)。所有第三方呼叫都在 server 端完成,公開瀏覽永遠只吃靜態 JSON,不暴露任何金鑰。
projects.descEn: A self-built Steam deals site positioned as "a SteamDB-style sale board + its own price history + Discord alerts". A backend worker (Node + TypeScript, cron roughly every 30 min) calls Steam's official store endpoints server-side (featuredcategories / appdetails / sale search — no API key, Taiwan region cc=tw) and GamerPower (permanently-claimable free games/DLC), writes each pass's TWD price into SQLite to accumulate a "since we started tracking" price trend and observed low, then bakes three static JSON files (deals / free / meta); an optional IsThereAnyDeal API can seed a real TWD all-time low for cold starts. The front end is an Astro static site (dark esports theme, zh-TW/en i18n, light/dark theme, PWA) with a sortable list and card view, per-row price sparklines, Steam review scores, live sale countdowns, an "ending soon" and a free-to-keep section, and a per-game detail page with a self-built history chart. The login subsystem uses Discord OAuth: favourites sync across devices (localStorage when logged out, merged on login), each game can carry a target price, and a Discord bot @-mentions or DMs you when a favourite hits a new tracked low or crosses its target — all governed by per-user notification preferences (price-drop / free / daily-weekly digest / genre filter / channel vs DM). Every third-party call happens server-side, so public browsing only ever reads static JSON and never exposes a key.

highlights.zh: 自建價格歷史而非串接第三方:worker 每輪把抓到的台幣價寫進 SQLite,累積成「本站追蹤以來」的走勢與史低(observed low),並誠實標示為『追蹤以來最低』而非冒充 SteamDB/ITAD runtime;另可選配 ITAD API Key 以真實台幣史低校正冷啟動初值,只改 game_stats、不污染累積曲線。
highlights.en: Its own price history instead of scraping a third party: each worker pass writes the TWD price into SQLite, accumulating a "since tracking" trend and observed low, honestly labelled "lowest since tracked" rather than impersonating SteamDB/ITAD runtime; an optional ITAD API key only seeds the cold-start all-time low and never pollutes the accumulated curve.

highlights.zh: 「server 端抓取、前端純靜態 JSON」的架構:對 Steam / GamerPower / ITAD 的呼叫全在 worker 完成,烤成 deals / free / meta 給前端 fetch,公開瀏覽零金鑰外洩、免重 build;npm-workspaces monorepo 切成 shared 純函式+型別 / worker / Astro web / api,純邏輯以 vitest TDD(全專案 160+ 測試)。
highlights.en: A "fetch on the server, ship static JSON to the client" architecture: every call to Steam / GamerPower / ITAD runs in the worker and is baked into deals / free / meta for the front end to fetch, so public browsing leaks no keys and needs no rebuild; the npm-workspaces monorepo splits into shared pure functions+types / worker / Astro web / api, with the pure logic on vitest TDD (160+ tests).

highlights.zh: 可登入的通知子系統:Discord OAuth 登入後願望清單跨裝置同步(未登入 localStorage、登入即合併)、每款可設目標價;worker 偵測「收藏且創本站新低/跌破目標」時,由 Discord bot 依 per-user 偏好以頻道 @你或私訊 DM 發送,含個人免費遊戲通知與每日/每週特價摘要;另可一鍵從公開 Steam 願望單(貼 SteamID64 或個人檔網址、免金鑰)匯入收藏。
highlights.en: A login-gated notification subsystem: after Discord OAuth the wishlist syncs across devices (localStorage when logged out, merged on login) and each game can carry a target price; when the worker detects a favourited game hitting a new tracked low or crossing its target, the bot delivers per-user — channel @-mention or DM — alongside personal free-game alerts and daily/weekly digests; favourites can be bulk-imported from a public Steam wishlist (SteamID64 or profile URL, no key).

highlights.zh: 完整自架部署:api(Fastify + better-sqlite3 + secure-session)與 worker 以 Docker Compose 跑在 Oracle ARM 主機,Caddy 同站代理 /api、/auth 並服務 Astro 靜態檔,外接 Cloudflare Tunnel 上線到 steam.terrychou.com;push 到 main 由 GitHub Actions 經 SSH 自動 git reset + compose 重建 + health check,祕密放主機 .env 不進 CI,與既有 soulshard 子站共存。
highlights.en: A fully self-hosted deploy: the api (Fastify + better-sqlite3 + secure-session) and worker run under Docker Compose on an Oracle ARM host, with Caddy same-origin-proxying /api and /auth while serving the Astro static files behind a Cloudflare Tunnel at steam.terrychou.com; push-to-main triggers a GitHub Actions SSH deploy (git reset + compose rebuild + health check), with secrets in the host .env outside CI, coexisting with the existing Soulshard subsite.

projects.challengesZh: 最大的取捨是「要不要自建價格歷史」:直接串第三方(SteamDB/ITAD runtime)最省事,但有授權與穩定性風險,因此選擇自抓自存、誠實標示「追蹤以來最低」,代價是冷啟動時史低不準——再以選配 ITAD API Key 校正初值、且只寫 game_stats 不污染累積曲線來折衷。架構上堅持「server 端抓取、前端純靜態 JSON」以杜絕金鑰外洩並免重 build,代價是犧牲即時性,於是用 cron(約 30 分)加上資料新鮮度標示換取簡單與安全。通知子系統最難的是「可靠送達且不重複、不遺失」:目標價必須看現價跌破即發(不能只在創新低時觸發),個人免費通知改用 per-user 基線加完整清單 feed,避免被全域上限永久略過——這些都以多代理對抗式 review(每筆 refute-by-default 驗證)與整合測試守住。部署則完全貼合既有 soulshard 架構(Cloudflare Tunnel → Caddy → Docker),避開已佔用的 8787 埠、cookie 依環境切換 secure,確保兩個子站互不干擾。
projects.challengesEn: The biggest trade-off was whether to build the price history myself: wiring a third party (SteamDB/ITAD runtime) is easiest but carries licensing and stability risk, so I chose to fetch and store it myself and label it honestly as "lowest since tracked" — at the cost of an inaccurate all-time low on cold start, which an optional ITAD API key reconciles by seeding only game_stats without polluting the accumulated curve. Architecturally I committed to "fetch on the server, serve static JSON on the client" to eliminate key leakage and avoid rebuilds, trading away real-time freshness for simplicity and safety via a ~30-minute cron plus a data-freshness indicator. The hardest part of the notification subsystem was reliable, non-duplicate, non-lossy delivery: target prices must fire the moment the current price crosses them (not only on a new low), and personal free-game alerts moved to a per-user baseline plus a full-list feed so nothing is permanently skipped by a global cap — all held in place by multi-agent adversarial review (refute-by-default per finding) and integration tests. Deployment hews exactly to the existing Soulshard setup (Cloudflare Tunnel → Caddy → Docker), avoiding the already-used port 8787 and switching cookie secure by environment so the two subsites never interfere.

demoFeasibility.notes: 已正式上線 https://steam.terrychou.com(Oracle ARM 主機上 Docker:api+worker、Caddy 同站、Cloudflare Tunnel)。特價/免費/走勢/詳情頁完全免登入即可體驗;Discord 登入解鎖願望清單跨裝置同步、目標價與 Discord 降價/免費通知。push 到 main 由 GitHub Actions 自動部署,與 soulshard 子站共存。

projects.oneLinerZh: 從零打造、已上線可實機體驗的全端製造業 ERP,涵蓋採購、生產、銷售、付款到人資的完整營運流程;核心是手寫的複式記帳總帳引擎——所有業務動作一律以借貸平衡的分錄入帳,帳永不半套、不平不可寫入。
projects.oneLinerEn: A from-scratch, live-deployed full-stack manufacturing ERP covering the complete procure–make–sell–pay–HR flow; at its core is a hand-written double-entry general ledger — every business action posts as a balanced journal entry, so the books are never half-posted and an unbalanced entry cannot be committed.
projects.descZh: 以 Java 21 + Spring Boot 4 + PostgreSQL 16(後端)與 React 19 + Mantine 9 + Vite + TypeScript(前端)打造、已上線可實機體驗的全端製造業 ERP。核心是一套手寫複式記帳總帳:進貨、生產、出貨、付款等業務動作,都與其文件、庫存異動在同一筆 DB 交易內過帳成借貸平衡分錄,並把關鍵不變式下放到資料庫約束——強制 debit=credit、已過帳分錄不可修改或刪除。整體採模組化單體(modular monolith),後端 12 個模組(總帳、主檔、庫存、採購到付款、訂單到收款、製造、付款、報表、人資、IAM、稽核、AI 助手)邊界由 ArchUnit 在 CI 機械化強制,模組間只能透過各自的 published port 互動;金額後端以自訂 Money 值物件(BigDecimal、scale 4、HALF_UP)、前端以 BigInt 精確處理,全程不用 float。前端涵蓋全部 13 個功能模組(儀表板、主檔、採購到付款、訂單到收款、製造、庫存、總帳、報表、稽核、人力資源、付款、AI 助手、列印),買→做→賣全流程皆可操作:人資含員工/部門/職位主檔 + 考勤/請假(核准工作流)/工時,以及薪資試算並過一張平衡分錄到總帳(Dr 薪資費用 / Cr 淨薪+代扣稅+勞健保);並以 @mantine/charts 呈現財會分析(營收/毛利趨勢、現金流、預算差異、KPI 環比)、庫存逐品項熱度 treemap、供應商準時率與工單排程 Gantt;儀表板以『對帳健康檢查』為 hero(全域試算表平衡、庫存/AP/AR 子帳對到 GL 控制科目、過渡科目歸零)。會計深度上另做了年度結帳(損益結轉保留盈餘、期間 hard-close)與分錄沖正(不可變帳本以鏡像沖正分錄更正,而非改帳)。資料層由 springdoc-openapi 產生型別安全的 TypeScript client(自動注入 JWT、401 靜默 refresh),認證採 JWT + 持久化使用者/角色(bcrypt,5 角色 ADMIN/ACCOUNTANT/WAREHOUSE/SALES/HR + 唯讀 guest),可觀測性以 Micrometer / Prometheus / Grafana 呈現。UI 為自建的『墨青帳房(Ink Ledger)』設計系統:墨青主色 + 宣紙暖石灰、朱印 SealBadge 審核章(已核准雙框圓章/已過帳墨印/待審灰框)、自架 Noto Serif TC 襯線標題(216 分片、零 CDN),並以 52 條 WCAG AA 對比單元測試把關,支援深/淺色即時切換、雙語(中/英)、列印/PDF 報表與 13 步手刻新手導覽。此外整合了 ERP Copilot——Claude 驅動的 agent loop AI 助手:自然語言查庫存/AR/KPI 等(12 個工具、SSE 串流聊天),寫入動作走 human-in-the-loop 確認卡(使用者按下才執行),工具以使用者自己的 JWT 回打自家 REST(權限上限=本人),所有 AI 動作進 append-only 稽核軌跡;另附 TypeScript stdio MCP server,讓 Claude Desktop / Claude Code 直連 ERP(Copilot 於線上 demo 預設關閉,本機以 API key 開啟即可完整體驗)。測試為後端 81 單元 + 131 個 Testcontainers 整合測試(對真實 PostgreSQL)共 212 全綠(JaCoCo 指令 72% / 分支 60%)、前端 239 個 Vitest 測試,加上 ArchUnit 邊界與對帳/年結/薪資過帳驗收、Playwright smoke,CI 另含 CodeQL / Trivy / JaCoCo。一行 docker compose 指令即可把 postgres + 自動 seed 的後端 + 前端整套拉起,並已部署為線上 live demo(唯讀 guest 可直接體驗)。
projects.descEn: A full-stack, live-deployed manufacturing ERP built on Java 21 + Spring Boot 4 + PostgreSQL 16 (backend) and React 19 + Mantine 9 + Vite + TypeScript (frontend). Its core is a hand-written double-entry general ledger: goods receipt, production, shipment and payment each post a balanced journal entry within the same DB transaction as their document and inventory change, with key invariants pushed into database constraints — enforcing debit=credit and making posted entries immutable. It is a modular monolith whose 12 backend modules (ledger, master data, inventory, procure-to-pay, order-to-cash, manufacturing, payments, reporting, HR, IAM, audit, AI assistant) have boundaries mechanically enforced by ArchUnit in CI (modules interact only through each other's published ports); money is exact end to end — a custom Money value object (BigDecimal, scale 4, HALF_UP) on the backend and BigInt on the frontend, never floating point. The frontend covers all 13 feature modules (dashboard, master data, procure-to-pay, order-to-cash, manufacturing, inventory, ledger, reporting, audit, HR, payments, AI assistant, printing) with the full buy→make→sell flow operable: HR carries employee/department/position master data + attendance/leave (approval workflow)/timesheets, plus payroll that computes pay and posts one balanced entry to the GL (Dr salaries expense / Cr net pay + tax withheld + insurance); @mantine/charts dashboards show finance analytics (revenue/gross-margin trend, cash flow, budget variance, KPI deltas), a per-item inventory heat treemap, supplier on-time rate and a work-order schedule Gantt; and the dashboard leads with a reconciliation health check (global trial balance balanced, inventory/AP/AR subledgers tied to their GL control accounts, clearing accounts zeroed). Accounting depth extends to year-end close (net income rolled to retained earnings, periods hard-closed) and journal reversal (the immutable ledger is corrected with mirror-image reversing entries, never by editing). The data layer is a type-safe TypeScript client generated from the springdoc-openapi spec (auto-injected JWT, silent 401 refresh); auth is JWT with persisted users/roles (bcrypt, 5 roles ADMIN/ACCOUNTANT/WAREHOUSE/SALES/HR + a read-only guest); observability runs on Micrometer / Prometheus / Grafana. The UI is a hand-built "Ink Ledger" design system: an ink-teal primary over warm paper tones, a vermilion SealBadge approval stamp (double-ring seal for approved / ink stamp for posted / grey frame for pending), self-hosted, subsetted Noto Serif TC headings (216 slices, zero CDN), all guarded by 52 WCAG AA contrast unit tests, with instant dark/light switching, a bilingual (zh/en) UI, print/PDF reports and a hand-rolled 13-step onboarding tour. It also integrates ERP Copilot — a Claude-driven agent-loop assistant: natural-language queries over inventory/AR/KPIs (12 tools, SSE-streamed chat), with every write routed through a human-in-the-loop confirmation card (executed only when the user approves), tools calling back into the app's own REST with the user's own JWT (privilege capped at that user), and all AI actions written to an append-only audit trail; a companion TypeScript stdio MCP server lets Claude Desktop / Claude Code connect straight to the ERP (Copilot is disabled by default on the live demo; run it locally with an API key for the full experience). Testing is 81 backend unit + 131 Testcontainers integration tests against real PostgreSQL (212 total, JaCoCo 72% instruction / 60% branch) and 239 frontend Vitest tests, plus ArchUnit boundaries, reconciliation/year-end/payroll-posting acceptance checks and Playwright smoke, with CodeQL / Trivy / JaCoCo in CI. A single docker compose command brings up postgres + an auto-seeded backend + the frontend, and it is deployed as a live demo (a read-only guest can try it directly).

highlights.zh: 手寫複式記帳總帳引擎:進貨、生產、出貨、付款等業務動作,與其單據、庫存異動在同一筆資料庫交易內原子過帳成借貸平衡分錄;debit=credit 與「已過帳不可修改/刪除」更下放為資料庫約束,從資料層根本杜絕半套帳與不平帳。
highlights.en: Hand-written double-entry ledger engine: goods receipt, production, shipment and payment each post atomically — the document, its inventory change and a balanced journal entry land in one database transaction; debit=credit and posted-entry immutability are enforced as database constraints, ruling out half-posted or unbalanced books at the data layer.

highlights.zh: 模組化單體 + 機械化架構驗證:12 個後端模組(總帳、庫存、採購到付款、訂單到收款、製造、人資等)只能透過彼此的 published port 互動;邊界由 ArchUnit 在 CI 強制——違規 import 他模組內部或直接動其資料表就會讓建置失敗,邊界是測試而非口頭約定,設計取捨記錄於 ADR-0001。
highlights.en: Modular monolith with mechanically verified architecture: the 12 backend modules (ledger, inventory, procure-to-pay, order-to-cash, manufacturing, HR, …) interact only through each other's published ports; ArchUnit enforces the boundaries in CI — importing another module's internals or touching its tables fails the build — so boundaries are tests, not conventions, with the trade-offs recorded in ADR-0001.

highlights.zh: 金額正確性與真實整合測試:自訂 Money 值物件(BigDecimal、scale 4、HALF_UP,全程不用 float/double);以 JUnit 5 + Testcontainers 對真實 PostgreSQL 16 跑整合測試(非 mock)——後端 81 單元 + 131 整合共 212 全綠(JaCoCo 指令 72%/分支 60%),借貸平衡、不可竄改等不變式以實際資料庫約束驗證。
highlights.en: Money correctness with real integration tests: a custom Money value object (BigDecimal, scale 4, HALF_UP — never float/double); JUnit 5 + Testcontainers run integration tests against a real PostgreSQL 16 (not mocks) — 81 backend unit + 131 integration, 212 green in total (JaCoCo 72% instruction / 60% branch) — verifying invariants like balanced-and-immutable against the actual database constraints.

highlights.zh: 全端交付並上線,並延伸到 AI 與設計系統:後端 12 個模組與前端 13 個功能模組全數完成,買→做→賣全流程可操作,儀表板以『對帳健康檢查』即時證明帳對得平(子帳==GL 控制科目、過渡科目歸零)。在此之上整合 ERP Copilot——Claude 驅動的 agent loop(12 工具、SSE 串流),寫入動作走 human-in-the-loop 確認卡、以使用者自己的 JWT 回打自家 REST、所有動作進稽核軌跡,另附 stdio MCP server 讓 Claude Desktop/Code 直連;UI 為自建『墨青帳房(Ink Ledger)』設計系統(墨青主色 + 朱印審核章 + 自架襯線字型,52 條 WCAG AA 對比測試把關、深/淺色切換)。一行 docker compose 即可起整套,並已部署為唯讀 guest 可直接體驗的線上 demo。
highlights.en: Shipped full-stack and extended into AI and design-system work: the 12-module backend and the 13-module React frontend are both complete, with the full buy→make→sell flow operable, and a reconciliation health-check dashboard proves the books tie out in real time (subledgers == GL control accounts, clearing accounts zeroed). On top of that sits ERP Copilot — a Claude-driven agent loop (12 tools, SSE streaming) whose writes route through a human-in-the-loop confirmation card, call back into the app's own REST with the user's own JWT, and land in an audit trail, plus a stdio MCP server that lets Claude Desktop/Code connect directly; and the UI is a hand-built "Ink Ledger" design system (ink-teal primary + vermilion approval seals + self-hosted serif type, guarded by 52 WCAG AA contrast tests, with dark/light switching). One docker compose command brings up the whole stack — deployed as a live demo a read-only guest can try directly.

projects.challengesZh: 最大的取捨是『自建 vs 擴充既有 ERP(Odoo/ERPNext)』:擴充能更快交付商業價值,但本專案的目的是展示架構與 ERP 領域素養,因此選擇從零手寫過帳引擎,把 debit=credit 不變式、可對帳的不可變庫存子帳與『文件→庫存→分錄』管線做到逐行可辯護。為追求正確性而非僅是會動,刻意把核心不變式下放到資料庫約束(借貸平衡、已過帳不可改),金額一律用 BigDecimal 的 Money 值物件避免浮點誤差,並以 Testcontainers 對真實 PostgreSQL 做整合測試。架構上採模組化單體並以 ArchUnit 在 CI 機械化強制邊界,保留日後拆分服務的彈性。範圍上誠實地以 Phase 切分、先交付走骨架,並明列延後項目(多幣別/多租戶/FIFO 成本差異/完整 MRP/簽核流程等)——目前後端 12 模組與前端 13 個功能模組均已交付並上線,買→做→賣全流程可實機操作,並以對帳健康檢查即時驗證帳對得平;會計面補上年度結帳與分錄沖正,並進一步整合了 Claude 驅動、寫入需人工確認(HITL)的 ERP Copilot 與 MCP server,把 AI 動作納入同一套 RBAC 與稽核之下。
projects.challengesEn: The central trade-off was build-from-scratch vs. extending a packaged ERP (Odoo/ERPNext): extending ships business value faster, but the goal here is to demonstrate architecture and ERP-domain literacy, so the posting engine was hand-written to make the debit=credit invariant, a reconcilable immutable inventory subledger, and the document→inventory→ledger pipeline defensible line by line. To pursue correctness rather than merely 'it runs', core invariants were pushed into database constraints (balanced entries, immutable once posted), money is handled exclusively via a BigDecimal Money value object to avoid float error, and integration tests run against real PostgreSQL via Testcontainers. Architecturally it is a modular monolith with ArchUnit mechanically enforcing boundaries in CI, preserving the option to split into services later. Scope is honestly phased — the walking skeleton ships first, with an explicit deferred list (multi-currency / multi-tenancy / FIFO cost variance / full MRP / approval workflows) — and today all 12 backend and 13 frontend feature modules are delivered and live: the buy→make→sell flow is operable end to end, with a reconciliation health check verifying the books tie out. Accounting was rounded out with year-end close and journal reversal, and the system now also integrates ERP Copilot — a Claude-driven assistant whose writes require human-in-the-loop confirmation — plus an MCP server, keeping AI actions under the same RBAC and audit trail as everything else.

demoFeasibility.notes: 已部署為線上 live demo:https://erp.terrychou.com —— 登入頁預設的公開唯讀 guest 即可直接體驗完整前端(買→做→賣、對帳健康檢查、財報鑽取、庫存/總帳/人資等前端 13 個功能模組)。本機亦可一行 docker compose -f compose.demo.yaml up --build 起 postgres + 自動 seed 的後端 + 前端整套(前端 8081、Swagger UI 掛在後端);另可疊加 compose.observability.yaml 起 Prometheus + Grafana。ERP Copilot(Claude 驅動、寫入需人工確認的 AI 助手)預設關閉,線上 demo 未開啟;本機自備 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 並開啟 APP_ASSISTANT_ENABLED 即可完整體驗側欄對話與 MCP server 直連。

projects.titleZh: AI 用量監控 AI Usage Monitor
projects.oneLinerZh: 以 Tauri 2(Rust + React)打造、常駐 Windows 系統匣的 AI CLI 用量儀表——同時監控 Claude Code 與 Codex CLI 的 5 小時/週視窗額度,托盤圖示本身就是雙環量表;官方數字優先、資料源失效時優雅退化為明確標示的本機估算,跨門檻主動通知、燒速異常預警,100% 本機處理零遙測。
projects.oneLinerEn: A Tauri 2 (Rust + React) Windows system-tray dashboard for AI CLI usage — it watches both Claude Code's and Codex CLI's 5-hour/weekly rate-limit windows, with the tray icon itself as a dual-ring gauge; official numbers first, degrading gracefully to clearly-labelled local estimates when a source fails, with proactive threshold alerts and burn-rate warnings — 100% local, zero telemetry.
projects.descZh: 一個以 Tauri 2 打造、常駐 Windows 系統匣的 AI CLI 用量監控工具(安裝檔約 3.4MB)。訂閱制 AI CLI 的額度藏在 /usage、/status 指令裡,燒完才發現就太遲了——這個工具把 Claude Code 與 Codex CLI 兩家的 5 小時/週視窗用量放進眼角餘光。資料以官方數字優先:Codex 直接解析 session 檔內伺服器端 rate_limits 事件、Claude 走 OAuth 用量端點,都是帳號級準確百分比而非本機猜測;token 過期或 API 限流時自動退回本機統計並明確標示「估算值」,絕不謊報。平常它只是托盤角落一枚由 tiny-skia 動態繪製的雙環圖示(內環 Claude、外環 Codex,≥80% 轉黃、≥95% 轉紅),左鍵點開是三頁籤面板:儀表板(圓環量表、重置倒數、今日 token/成本分項、每家獨立刷新)、歷史(SQLite 落地 90 天,7/30 天用量折線)、設定(人話句子式通知規則、SMTP Email、資料來源、維護工具)。通知規則引擎支援用量門檻、額度回滿與燒速異常(依 usedPercent 斜率預估「將在 N 分鐘內打滿」,抓得住失控的 agent 迴圈)三類規則,同一視窗每條只觸發一次、武裝狀態跨重啟持久化不補發;Email 通道自設 SMTP(STARTTLS/隱式 TLS),內建寄測試信與防風暴閘門(失敗退避+每小時上限)。後端是 Rust:notify 監看兩個資料目錄(2 秒 debounce+60 秒兜底輪詢),Claude 對話紀錄以 offset 增量續讀、message.id 去重、mtime 剪枝,幾百 MB 歷史也不拖慢啟動;官方端點由 HTTP 狀態分類的狀態機把關(401 才是真過期、429 尊重 Retry-After 退避、暫時性失敗沿用最後成功值並標示更新時間),CLI 憑證失效立即提醒重新登入。架構上前端只做呈現,統一資料模型 UsageSnapshot 是唯一的擴充接縫——新增一家 AI CLI 等於實作一個 provider 模組。96 項 Rust 單元測試涵蓋解析器、掃描剪枝、通知引擎(含武裝持久化與保活判定)、OAuth 狀態分類、Email 閘門、歷史 DB 與托盤繪製,fixture 為自製樣本、測試不打真實網路。100% 本機處理:憑證只讀不寫、token 不落日誌、無任何遙測。
projects.descEn: A Tauri 2 tool that lives in the Windows system tray and monitors AI CLI usage (installer ~3.4MB). Subscription AI CLIs hide their quota behind /usage and /status commands, and by the time you notice it's burned it's too late — this tool keeps both Claude Code's and Codex CLI's 5-hour/weekly window usage in the corner of your eye. Official numbers come first: Codex is parsed from the server-side rate_limits events inside its session files and Claude from the OAuth usage endpoint — account-level accurate percentages, not local guesses; when a token expires or the API rate-limits, it falls back to local stats explicitly labelled as estimates, never fabricating a number. Most of the time it is just a dual-ring tray icon drawn live by tiny-skia (inner ring Claude, outer Codex; amber at ≥80%, red at ≥95%); a left click opens a three-tab panel: dashboard (ring gauges, reset countdowns, today's token/cost breakdown, per-provider refresh), history (a 90-day SQLite time series with 7/30-day trend lines) and settings (plain-sentence notification rules, SMTP email, data sources, maintenance tools). The notification rule engine supports three rule kinds — usage thresholds, window-reset ('quota is back') and burn-rate anomaly (a usedPercent-slope forecast of 'full in N minutes' that catches runaway agent loops); each rule fires once per window, with armed state persisted across restarts so relaunching never re-sends; the email channel takes your own SMTP (STARTTLS or implicit TLS) with a built-in test send and an anti-storm gate (failure backoff + hourly cap). The backend is Rust: notify watches both data directories (2-second debounce + 60-second fallback polling); Claude transcripts are resumed incrementally by offset with message.id dedup and mtime pruning, so hundreds of MB of history never slow startup; the official endpoint sits behind an HTTP-status-classified state machine (only 401 means truly expired, 429 honours Retry-After backoff, transient failures keep the last good value with an 'updated N min ago' label), and a failed CLI credential triggers an immediate re-login reminder. Architecturally the frontend is presentation-only and the unified UsageSnapshot model is the single extension seam — supporting another AI CLI means implementing one provider module. 96 Rust unit tests cover the parsers, scan pruning, the notification engine (including armed-state persistence and keep-alive), OAuth status classification, the email gate, the history DB and tray drawing, on self-made fixtures with no real network calls. Processing is 100% local: credentials are read-only, tokens never reach logs, zero telemetry.

highlights.zh: 官方數字優先的穩健資料狀態機:Codex 直接解析 session 檔內伺服器端 rate_limits 事件、Claude 走 OAuth 用量端點,都是帳號級準確百分比而非本機猜測;失敗一律以 HTTP 狀態分類(401 才是真過期)、429 尊重 Retry-After 退避、暫時性失敗沿用最後成功值並標示「更新於 N 分前」,只有真失效才退回本機統計且明標「估算值」——資料源不可用就優雅退化,絕不謊報。
highlights.en: Official numbers first, behind a robust data state machine: Codex is parsed from server-side rate_limits events in its session files and Claude from the OAuth usage endpoint — account-level percentages, not local guesses; failures are classified by HTTP status (only 401 means truly expired), 429 honours Retry-After backoff, transient failures keep the last good value labelled 'updated N min ago', and only a real credential failure falls back to local stats explicitly marked as estimates — graceful degradation, never a fabricated number.

highlights.zh: 檔案監看+增量解析,幾百 MB 歷史也不拖慢啟動:notify 監看兩個資料目錄(2 秒 debounce+60 秒兜底輪詢);Claude 對話紀錄以 offset 續讀、message.id 去重、mtime 剪枝與游標修剪,只重讀有變動的檔尾;設定變更(含資料目錄路徑)熱重載即時生效,每家資料源各有獨立的手動刷新。
highlights.en: File watching plus incremental parsing, so hundreds of MB of history never slow startup: notify watches both data directories (2-second debounce + 60-second fallback polling); Claude transcripts are resumed by offset with message.id dedup, mtime pruning and cursor trimming, so only changed file tails are re-read; settings changes (including data-directory paths) hot-reload instantly, and each provider has its own manual refresh.

highlights.zh: 純函式通知規則引擎:用量門檻、額度回滿、燒速異常(依 usedPercent 斜率預估「將在 N 分鐘內打滿」,抓得住失控的 agent 迴圈)三類規則,通道可選 Windows toast/SMTP Email/兩者;同一視窗每條規則只觸發一次、resets_at 重置後重新武裝,武裝狀態跨重啟持久化、重開 app 不補發;Email 走獨立發送執行緒,內建防風暴閘門(失敗退避+每小時上限)與寄測試信。
highlights.en: A pure-function notification rule engine: three rule kinds — usage thresholds, window-reset ('quota is back'), and burn-rate anomaly (a usedPercent-slope forecast of 'full in N minutes' that catches runaway agent loops) — each deliverable via Windows toast, SMTP email or both; every rule fires once per window and re-arms after resets_at, with armed state persisted across restarts so relaunching never re-sends; email runs on its own sender thread behind an anti-storm gate (failure backoff + hourly cap) with a built-in test send.

highlights.zh: 托盤即儀表+隱私與品質:tiny-skia 動態繪製雙環托盤圖示(內環 Claude、外環 Codex,≥80% 轉黃、≥95% 轉紅,量化去重、必要時才重繪);SQLite 落地 90 天用量時間序列,供 7/30 天折線;100% 本機處理——憑證只讀不寫、token 不落日誌、無任何遙測;96 項 Rust 單元測試涵蓋解析器、掃描剪枝、通知引擎(含武裝持久化與保活判定)、OAuth 狀態分類、Email 閘門、歷史 DB 與托盤繪製,fixture 自製、不打真實網路。
highlights.en: The tray icon is the dashboard, with privacy and quality built in: tiny-skia draws a dual-ring tray icon live (inner ring Claude, outer Codex; amber at ≥80%, red at ≥95%; quantised dedup so it only redraws when needed); usage snapshots land in SQLite as a 90-day time series behind 7/30-day trend charts; processing is 100% local — credentials are read-only, tokens never reach logs, zero telemetry; 96 Rust unit tests cover the parsers, scan pruning, the notification engine (including armed-state persistence and keep-alive), OAuth status classification, the email gate, the history DB and tray drawing, on self-made fixtures with no real network calls.

projects.challengesZh: 最大的挑戰是「依賴一個非官方端點,卻要給出可信的數字」:Claude 的官方用量百分比來自未文件化的 OAuth 端點,限流極嚴(實測懲罰窗可達 1 小時)且隨時可能改版。因此把所有失敗收進一個以 HTTP 狀態分類的狀態機——401 才是真過期、429 尊重 Retry-After 退避、5xx/網路錯誤沿用最後成功值並標示「更新於 N 分前」、端點改版時顯示明確訊息並自動退回本機估算——原則是寧可標示「估算值」也絕不謊報。第二個取捨在通知的「可靠但不騷擾」:門檻通知同一視窗只該響一次,但 app 重啟不能補發、視窗重置後又要重新武裝,最後把武裝狀態持久化並以 resets_at 為重武裝邊界,引擎核心做成純函式以便測試窮舉;Email 通道再加防風暴閘門,避免規則設錯時轟炸信箱。另一個實際踩到的坑是桌面版 Claude Code 的憑證存在自己的加密儲存區、不會刷新 credentials.json,只用桌面版會讓 token 無感過期退回估算模式——為此做了 token 保活提醒:憑證失效立即通知,接近過期且官方端點久未成功時提前預警。
projects.challengesEn: The hardest problem was depending on an unofficial endpoint while still showing numbers you can trust: Claude's official usage percentages come from an undocumented OAuth endpoint that is aggressively rate-limited (penalty windows of up to an hour in practice) and could change shape at any time. Every failure therefore funnels into an HTTP-status-classified state machine — only 401 means truly expired, 429 honours Retry-After backoff, 5xx/network errors keep the last good value labelled 'updated N min ago', and a reshaped endpoint shows an explicit message and falls back to local estimates — on the principle that a number marked 'estimate' beats a fabricated one. The second trade-off was making notifications reliable but not noisy: a threshold should fire once per window, yet an app restart must not re-send and a window reset must re-arm it — solved by persisting armed state keyed on resets_at, with the engine core kept as pure functions so the cases can be tested exhaustively; the email channel adds an anti-storm gate so a misconfigured rule cannot flood an inbox. One pitfall actually hit along the way: the Claude Code desktop app keeps credentials in its own encrypted store and never refreshes credentials.json, so desktop-only usage silently expires the token into estimate mode — hence the token keep-alive reminders: an immediate alert on credential failure, and an early warning when expiry nears while the official endpoint has not succeeded for a while.

demoFeasibility.notes: Windows 桌面應用(Tauri 2,安裝檔約 3.4MB)。至 GitHub Releases 下載 NSIS(.exe)或 .msi 安裝即可體驗,啟動後常駐系統匣;開發模式 npm run tauri dev(需 Node.js 20+、Rust stable、WebView2)。僅在 Windows 11 上測試。

projects.titleZh: 結合街景分析與燈號辨識之智慧導航系統
projects.titleEn: Smart Navigation via Street-Scene Analysis and Traffic-Light Detection
projects.oneLinerZh: 整合街景語意分割、手勢辨識與手機導航的行人導航輔助專題,在單一即時管線中判斷行人所在的可通行區域並做語音提示。
projects.oneLinerEn: A capstone pedestrian-navigation assistant that fuses street-scene semantic segmentation, hand-gesture recognition, and phone navigation into one real-time pipeline that checks whether the walker is on a passable area and issues voice alerts.
projects.descZh: 畢業專題,將三條獨立技術線整合成單一即時管線:以 FC-DenseNet103(InceptionV4 前端)在 TensorFlow 1.x 上做街景語意分割,以 MediaPipe 做手勢辨識,並透過 Java NIO Socket 從 Android 導航 App(改自 FancyNavi / HERE SDK)接收路線資訊。主程式 Main.py 逐幀擷取攝影機或影片,跑分割推論後,以 BFS 連通域分析判斷使用者是否位於可行區域(路面像素),並把導航距離、轉向角與箭頭疊加回畫面;偵測到揮手「Stop」手勢時以 playsound 觸發語音提示。整體偏研究/概念驗證,模型與資料前處理皆可重現。
projects.descEn: A university capstone that stitches three independent technology tracks into one real-time pipeline: street-scene semantic segmentation with FC-DenseNet103 (InceptionV4 frontend) on TensorFlow 1.x, hand-gesture recognition via MediaPipe, and route data received from an Android navigation app (adapted from FancyNavi / HERE SDK) over a Java NIO socket. The Main.py loop grabs frames from a camera or video, runs segmentation inference, then uses a BFS connected-component analysis to decide whether the user is standing on a walkable/road region (road-class pixels) and overlays navigation distance, turn angle and a direction arrow onto the frame; when a waving "Stop" gesture is detected it fires a voice alert via playsound. It is a research/proof-of-concept build with reproducible model training and dataset preprocessing.

highlights.zh: 以 FC-DenseNet103 + InceptionV4 前端在 TensorFlow 1.x 上訓練街景語意分割,並採 CamVid 與自製補充資料集 1:1 混合,提升對在地街景的泛化能力;附帶資料集 label 顏色轉換工具讓兩套資料的標註對齊。
highlights.en: Trained FC-DenseNet103 with an InceptionV4 frontend on TensorFlow 1.x for street-scene segmentation, using a 1:1 mix of CamVid and a self-collected dataset to improve generalization to local scenes; a custom label-recoloring tool aligns annotations across the two datasets.

highlights.zh: 在分割結果上以 BFS 連通域分析計算路面區塊的形心與面積,判斷行人是否站在可通行區域,並把距離、轉向角與導引箭頭即時疊加回原畫面,而不是只輸出一張遮罩。
highlights.en: On top of the segmentation mask, runs a BFS connected-component pass to compute the centroid and area of road regions, infers whether the user is on a walkable/road area, and overlays distance, turn angle and a guidance arrow back onto the live frame rather than just emitting a raw mask.

highlights.zh: 用 MediaPipe Hands 加上 keypoint / point-history 分類器辨識揮手「Stop」手勢,連續觸發時以語音(gTTS 預生成、playsound 播放)提示,作為人機互動的安全信號。
highlights.en: Recognizes a waving 'Stop' gesture using MediaPipe Hands with keypoint and point-history classifiers, and on sustained detection issues a voice alert (gTTS-generated audio played via playsound) as a human-in-the-loop safety signal.

highlights.zh: 跨平台整合:Android 端(改自 FancyNavi,基於 HERE SDK)做即時導航,透過自寫的 Java NIO 非阻塞 Socket 伺服器把路線資訊串到 Python 主程式,並刻意以 Java 取代較慢的 Python socket 版本以維持吞吐。
highlights.en: Cross-platform integration: an Android app (adapted from FancyNavi, built on the HERE SDK) handles live navigation and streams route data to the Python core through a hand-written non-blocking Java NIO socket server, deliberately chosen over a slower pure-Python socket to keep throughput up.

projects.challengesZh: 最大的取捨是把三套來源各異的開源元件(語意分割套件、Android 導航 App、MediaPipe 手勢專案)整合成單一即時迴圈,且要在 TensorFlow 1.x 的舊式 session/placeholder API 下維持可用幀率——做法是每隔固定幀數才送一次分割推論。可行區域判斷沒有額外標註,而是用純像素級 BFS 連通域分析在分割輸出上即時計算,簡單但對分割品質與雜訊敏感。跨裝置通訊上,Python socket 版本太慢,因此改寫成 Java NIO 非阻塞伺服器接收手機端路線字串。需要誠實說明的限制:標題雖含「燈號辨識」,但整合後的執行管線中燈號分類僅以註解形式預留、尚未實際接上,實作完成的安全信號是「可行區域判斷 + 揮手 Stop 語音提示」;系統為桌面 Python + Android 的研究原型,綁定 TF1.x 與本機攝影機/socket,無法直接於瀏覽器執行。
projects.challengesEn: The core trade-off was fusing three differently-sourced open-source components (a segmentation suite, an Android navigation app, and a MediaPipe gesture project) into one real-time loop while keeping a usable frame rate under TensorFlow 1.x's legacy session/placeholder API — handled by running segmentation inference only every N frames. The walkability decision uses no extra labels; it is computed on the fly from the segmentation output via a pure pixel-level BFS connected-component analysis, which is simple but sensitive to mask quality and noise. For cross-device messaging, the pure-Python socket was too slow, so route strings from the phone are received by a rewritten non-blocking Java NIO server. An honest limitation: despite 'traffic-light detection' in the title, traffic-light classification is only stubbed (left as a comment) in the integrated runtime and not wired in — the implemented safety signals are the road-area check plus the wave 'Stop' voice alert. It is a desktop Python + Android research prototype bound to TF1.x and a local camera/socket, so it cannot run in a browser.

demoFeasibility.notes: 無法作為瀏覽器 live demo。系統是桌面端 Python 即時管線(TensorFlow 1.x session/placeholder API、OpenCV 攝影機擷取、MediaPipe、playsound/gTTS)加上一支需 Android Studio 編譯、依賴 HERE SDK 的 Android App,並透過 Java NIO Socket 互通;前端並非可獨立靜態部署的網頁,且需要訓練好的模型 checkpoint 與本機攝影機/影片輸入。展示方式建議用 README 架構說明加上 output/ 內的分割疊加結果截圖或錄影,而非線上互動 demo。

projects.oneLinerZh: 規格驅動開發的私人公會 Discord 管家 Bot,以 milestone 漸進交付動畫/票券訂閱、Gemini 問答與頻道摘要,部署於 Oracle Cloud ARM 免費資源。
projects.oneLinerEn: A spec-driven private-guild Discord butler bot, delivered milestone by milestone, targeting anime/ticket subscriptions, Gemini Q&A, and channel summaries on Oracle Cloud ARM free tier.
projects.descZh: 服務小型朋友群組的多功能 Discord 管家 Bot,以 Python 3.12 async 為核心,在單一專案內收斂 Backend / DB / Cache / Scheduler / Crawler / LLM / Container / CI/CD 的技術廣度。專案以一份權威工程規格書(PROJECT_SPEC.md)驅動,明訂 milestone 順序與每階段的 Definition of Done。目前已完成 M0 骨架與 M1 核心:discord.py 2.x 生命週期管理與 guild-scoped slash command 同步、FastAPI 健康檢查端點(/healthz、/readyz、/version)、SQLAlchemy 2.x async + asyncpg 與首版 Alembic migration、指令呼叫追蹤,以及多階段 linux/arm64 Docker image 與 GitHub Actions CI。M3–M6 的動畫爬蟲、票券監控與 Gemini LLM 功能已完成介面與資料模型設計,實作尚在規劃中。
projects.descEn: A multi-function Discord butler bot for a small friend guild, built on Python 3.12 async and deliberately spanning backend, DB, cache, scheduler, crawler, LLM, container, and CI/CD within one project. Development is driven by a single canonical engineering spec (PROJECT_SPEC.md) that fixes milestone order and a Definition of Done per stage. The M0 skeleton and M1 core are complete: discord.py 2.x lifecycle with guild-scoped slash-command sync, FastAPI health endpoints (/healthz, /readyz, /version), SQLAlchemy 2.x async + asyncpg with the first Alembic migration, command-invocation tracking, plus a multi-stage linux/arm64 Docker image and GitHub Actions CI. The anime crawler, ticket monitoring, and Gemini LLM features (M3–M6) have their interfaces and data model designed but their implementation is still planned.

highlights.zh: 規格驅動開發:撰寫一份 v2.0 權威工程規格書,涵蓋系統架構、資料模型、技術選型理由、milestone 順序與每階段 Definition of Done,並明列反模式(如禁止 mock 冒充真實 API 通過、production image 必須 arm64),作為實作的單一真實來源。
highlights.en: Spec-driven development: a v2.0 canonical engineering spec covers architecture, data model, technology trade-offs, milestone order, and a per-stage Definition of Done, plus explicit anti-patterns (e.g. never claim mocked tests as real-API coverage, production images must be arm64) — serving as the single source of truth.

highlights.zh: 嚴謹的應用生命週期:main.py 以明確的啟動/關閉順序協調 FastAPI(uvicorn 作為 asyncio task)、Discord client、DB engine 與 Redis,自行接管 SIGINT/SIGTERM,並在 DISCORD_TOKEN 缺席時退化為 API-only 模式讓健康檢查持續運作。
highlights.en: Disciplined application lifecycle: main.py orchestrates FastAPI (uvicorn as an asyncio task), the Discord client, the DB engine, and Redis with explicit startup/shutdown ordering, manages SIGINT/SIGTERM itself, and degrades to API-only mode when DISCORD_TOKEN is absent so health checks keep serving.

highlights.zh: 為 OCI Always Free ARM 量身的部署管線:多階段 Docker build(uv 安裝、非 root 使用者、curl healthcheck),分離 dev/prod docker-compose,CI 跑 ruff + mypy strict + pytest 與 amd64 build smoke,正式部署則 build linux/arm64。
highlights.en: Deployment pipeline tailored for OCI Always Free ARM: a multi-stage Docker build (uv install, non-root user, curl-based healthcheck), separate dev/prod docker-compose files, CI running ruff + mypy strict + pytest plus an amd64 build smoke, while production builds linux/arm64.

highlights.zh: 可觀測性與分層設計從第一天落地:結構化 JSON logging(structlog)、command_invocations 追蹤每次指令的延遲與狀態,並以 cogs(Discord adapter)/ services(業務邏輯)/ repositories(資料存取)/ crawlers(外部呼叫)的清楚分層約束可測試性。
highlights.en: Observability and layering baked in from day one: structured JSON logging (structlog), a command_invocations table tracking per-command latency and status, and a strict cogs (Discord adapters) / services (business logic) / repositories (data access) / crawlers (external calls) separation that keeps the code testable.

projects.challengesZh: 最大的取捨是「先把工程地基做扎實,再逐步長出功能」:專案刻意以 milestone 推進(M0 骨架 → M1 lifecycle/health → M2 部署 → M3 動畫 → M4 LLM → M5 票券 → M6 observability),目前停在 M1 完成,M3–M6 的 service/crawler 檔案僅有 docstring 與規格引用、尚未實作,因此它呈現的是一個架構與規範完整、但功能仍在建構中的專案。技術層面的難點包含:在單一 async event loop 中協調 Discord gateway、uvicorn、scheduler 與 DB/Redis 的啟動與優雅關閉;為求快速迭代採用 guild-scoped slash command 同步而非全域(避免約一小時的傳播延遲);以及預先把爬蟲/LLM 的 rate limit、timeout、retry 與通知去重(notification_deliveries 唯一約束)納入資料模型設計,避免日後重構。另一個現實取捨是票券/動畫來源網站改版機率高,規格因此強制要求 crawler 必須有 fixture 測試、並尊重 robots.txt 與低頻率抓取,不做侵入式繞過。
projects.challengesEn: The central trade-off is foundations-first delivery: development is intentionally milestone-paced (M0 skeleton → M1 lifecycle/health → M2 deploy → M3 anime → M4 LLM → M5 tickets → M6 observability), and the repo currently sits at completed M1. The M3–M6 service/crawler files contain only docstrings and spec references and are not yet implemented, so the project reads as architecturally and procedurally complete but still under feature construction. Technical challenges include coordinating the Discord gateway, uvicorn, the scheduler, and DB/Redis startup and graceful shutdown within a single async event loop; choosing guild-scoped slash-command sync over global to avoid the ~1-hour propagation delay during iteration; and designing rate limiting, timeouts, retries, and notification de-duplication (a unique constraint on notification_deliveries) into the data model up front to avoid later rework. A further real-world trade-off: ticket/anime source sites change frequently, so the spec mandates crawler fixture tests and polite, low-frequency fetching that respects robots.txt rather than intrusive scraping.

demoFeasibility.notes: 不適合作為瀏覽器 live demo。本專案是後端 Discord bot,執行需 Discord bot token 與已邀請的 guild、PostgreSQL 16、Redis 7,並透過 Discord gateway 與 slash command 互動,無獨立前端可靜態部署。展示形式建議用 showcase(架構圖、PROJECT_SPEC.md 規格書節錄、Dockerfile/CI 片段、健康檢查端點 JSON 範例),不建議嘗試在瀏覽器跑成 live demo。

projects.oneLinerZh: 用 Playwright 驅動瀏覽器自動執行 Discord 斜線指令,內建 Kelly 投注、股票訊號、Rich 終端與零依賴 Web 儀表板雙介面的長時運行 asyncio 機器人。
projects.oneLinerEn: A long-running asyncio bot that drives Discord slash commands via Playwright, with Kelly-based betting, stock signals, and dual Rich-terminal plus zero-dependency web dashboard interfaces.
projects.descZh: 以 Playwright 控制 Chromium、模擬使用者帳號自動執行 Discord 斜線指令的自動化機器人,以單一 asyncio event loop 並行協調 10 條排程 loop(整點/每日/賭博/轉帳/貓娘/股票/新聞/摘要/版本更新/除錯)。所有送指令動作共用一把 command_lock 序列化,並以「最新一則 ephemeral」錨點切片解析 Discord 累積式回應,解決多 loop 互相污染 parser 的核心難題。下注分析採半 Kelly + EV 95% 信賴區間下界(需 ≥200 筆樣本)做保守估計,並提供時段過濾、滾動視窗 EV、Trailing Stop 等可組合的風險管理策略。設定與歷史全存於 Fernet 加密的 SQLite,並同時提供 Rich 終端 UI 與純 Python stdlib(http.server)、零外部依賴的 Web 儀表板(HTTP Basic Auth + CSRF 防護)。
projects.descEn: An automation bot that drives Chromium via Playwright to run Discord slash commands as a user account, coordinating 10 scheduled loops (hourly/daily/gambling/transfer/nekomusume/stock/news/digest/updater/debug) concurrently on a single asyncio event loop. Every command-sending action shares one command_lock for serialization, and Discord's accumulating ephemeral replies are parsed by anchoring on the latest ephemeral slice — solving the core problem of multiple loops corrupting each other's response parsing. Betting analysis uses half-Kelly sizing off the lower bound of the EV's 95% confidence interval (requiring ≥200 samples) for conservative estimates, alongside composable risk-management strategies (hourly filtering, rolling-window EV, trailing stop). Config and history live in a Fernet-encrypted SQLite database, exposed through both a Rich terminal UI and a pure-stdlib (http.server) zero-dependency web dashboard with HTTP Basic Auth and CSRF protection.

highlights.zh: 以單一 asyncio event loop 並行 10 條排程 loop,所有送指令動作共用 command_lock 序列化,並用 channel_context 在獨立頻道間切換,避免不同指令的回應互相污染解析。
highlights.en: Runs 10 scheduled loops concurrently on one asyncio event loop, serializing every command via a shared command_lock and isolating commands across dedicated channels with a channel_context manager to prevent cross-contaminated response parsing.

highlights.zh: 解決 Discord ephemeral 訊息累積不替換的解析難題:用 rfind + anchor 切片只解析「最新一則 ephemeral」,並自寫 DOM walk 把 emoji 的 alt 接回 textContent,否則 slot 符號會全空。
highlights.en: Tackles Discord's append-only ephemeral messages by slicing on the latest ephemeral via rfind anchoring, and walks the DOM to recover emoji alt text into textContent — without which slot symbols parse as empty strings.

highlights.zh: 保守的 Kelly 投注:用 EV 95% 信賴區間下界 (ev − 1.96·SE) 取代點估計、半 Kelly + 0.25 上限、需 ≥200 筆樣本才啟用;並坦承負 EV 下任何策略只能降 variance/drawdown 而非翻正期望值。
highlights.en: Conservative Kelly sizing using the EV's 95% CI lower bound (ev − 1.96·SE) instead of a point estimate, half-Kelly capped at 0.25, gated on ≥200 samples — and is candid that under negative EV these strategies only reduce variance/drawdown, never flip expectation positive.

highlights.zh: 工程化的可靠性與運維:loop 連續失敗自動 auto_paused 冷卻 30 分鐘、page 失敗 3 次觸發 exit 42 由 run.bat 自動重啟、session 過期偵測引導重登,並把 WARNING+ 推到獨立 Discord 頻道讓手機端遠端可見。
highlights.en: Production-minded reliability: loops auto-pause for a 30-minute cooldown after repeated failures, 3 page failures trigger exit code 42 for run.bat to auto-relaunch, session expiry is detected and re-login guided, and WARNING+ logs are pushed to a dedicated Discord channel for remote visibility on mobile.

projects.challengesZh: 最大難點是 Discord Web 的回應解析:ephemeral 訊息累積在 page textContent 而非替換,emoji 又被渲染成不含 alt 的 ,導致多個排程 loop 的回應會互相污染。取捨上選擇「browser 自動化使用者帳號」而非官方 Bot API,換取存取一般 bot 拿不到的私服互動指令,代價是違反 Discord ToS、解析脆弱且需大量防禦性工程(command_lock 序列化、anchor 切片、自寫 DOM walk)。另一刻意取捨是 Web 儀表板堅持用純 stdlib http.server 零外部依賴,雖犧牲框架便利性,卻換來極簡部署與更小攻擊面(再自行補上 hmac.compare_digest 比對、CSRF 同源檢查、log redaction)。風險管理上也誠實面對數學現實——負 EV 的拉霸無法靠下注策略翻正,因此策略定位為降 variance/drawdown 而非「致勝法」;且 Discord modal 太脆弱,自動下單功能已移除且不會回歸。
projects.challengesEn: The hardest problem is parsing Discord's web responses: ephemeral messages accumulate in page textContent instead of being replaced, and emoji render as tags with no recoverable text, so multiple scheduled loops corrupt each other's parsing. The key trade-off was driving a *user account* via browser automation rather than the official Bot API — gaining access to private-server interaction commands a normal bot can't reach, at the cost of violating Discord's ToS, fragile parsing, and heavy defensive engineering (command_lock serialization, anchored slicing, custom DOM walking). Another deliberate trade-off is the web dashboard built on pure stdlib http.server with zero external dependencies: sacrificing framework convenience for trivial deployment and a smaller attack surface, while hand-rolling hmac.compare_digest comparison, CSRF same-origin checks, and log redaction. On risk management it confronts the math honestly — no betting strategy flips negative-EV slots positive, so the strategies are framed as variance/drawdown reducers, not a winning system; auto-trading was removed (Discord modals proved too fragile) and explicitly won't return.

demoFeasibility.notes: 無法作為瀏覽器 live demo。專案本質是 Windows 桌面長時運行程式:用 Playwright 啟動 Chromium 自動化一個已登入的 Discord 使用者帳號(需手動 2FA 登入、需特定私服與目標 bot 互動),並把資料存進本機 Fernet 加密 SQLite。Web 儀表板雖然存在,但它讀取的是即時 runtime 狀態(http.server 後端 + 本機 DB),並非可獨立靜態部署的純前端,且需要 HTTP Basic Auth 與真實 bot 資料才有內容——無法用 mock 資料有意義地靜態化。建議在履歷以 showcase(README/架構圖/螢幕截圖)呈現,而非 live demo。

projects.oneLinerZh: 用原生 C++ 從零打造的單機 MOBA,刻意把模擬邏輯與渲染徹底分離,為日後多人連線預留架構。
projects.oneLinerEn: A native C++ single-player MOBA built from scratch, with simulation logic deliberately decoupled from rendering to leave room for future multiplayer.
projects.descZh: 以 C++17 + raylib 開發的簡化版 LoL 風格 MOBA 學習專案,單機可玩一整局:選英雄、三線地圖補兵打野、買裝升級、推塔破主堡分勝負。核心設計是把純模擬邏輯(實體階層、固定時間步長、戰鬥)放進不依賴 raylib 與網路的 shared 靜態庫,client 只負責渲染/輸入/音效/資產,讓同一份邏輯日後能直接搬到權威伺服器重用。
projects.descEn: A simplified LoL-style MOBA learning project in C++17 + raylib, playable end-to-end in single-player: pick a hero, farm minions and jungle on a three-lane map, buy items, push towers, and destroy the enemy nexus to win. The key design separates pure simulation logic (entity hierarchy, fixed timestep, combat) into a raylib- and network-free `shared` static library, while the client handles only rendering, input, audio, and assets — so the same logic can later be reused unchanged on an authoritative server.

highlights.zh: 邏輯與渲染分離:模擬放在不碰 raylib、不碰網路的 shared 庫,邏輯只寫一次,為多人連線預留可重用的伺服器邏輯。
highlights.en: Logic/render split: simulation lives in a raylib-free, network-free `shared` library — written once and ready to be reused server-side for multiplayer.

highlights.zh: 物件導向實體階層(Entity → Hero/Minion/Tower/Nexus/NeutralMonster/Projectile)+ 固定時間步長,模擬具決定性、便於日後搬上伺服器。
highlights.en: OO entity hierarchy (Entity → Hero/Minion/Tower/Nexus/NeutralMonster/Projectile) with a fixed timestep for deterministic, server-portable simulation.

highlights.zh: 附 headless 戰鬥單元測試,不需 raylib 即可驗證 shared 模擬邏輯。
highlights.en: Includes headless combat unit tests that verify the `shared` simulation without needing raylib.

projects.challengesZh: vcpkg 的 raylib 6.0 在開發機上 EndDrawing 失效導致白畫面,因此改用 CMake FetchContent 固定 raylib 5.5,其餘相依仍走 vcpkg。Lua 腳本層與 ENet 連線屬規劃中的後期階段,尚未實作。
projects.challengesEn: vcpkg's raylib 6.0 had a broken EndDrawing on the dev machine (white screen), so raylib 5.5 is pinned via CMake FetchContent while other deps stay on vcpkg. The planned Lua scripting layer and ENet networking are later-phase work, not yet implemented.

demoFeasibility.notes: 原生 C++/raylib 桌面應用,需 Windows + MSVC 編譯後執行 client.exe,無法在瀏覽器跑成 live demo,也沒有可獨立靜態部署的前端。建議用截圖/錄影展示。

projects.oneLinerZh: 以 PyQt6 打造的 Windows 桌面動畫瀏覽器,串接巴哈姆特動畫瘋 API,全程非同步載入不卡 UI。
projects.oneLinerEn: A PyQt6 Windows desktop anime browser backed by the Bahamut Anime Crazy API, with fully asynchronous loading that keeps the UI responsive.
projects.descZh: 整合巴哈姆特動畫瘋的 mobile 與 web 兩套 API,提供首頁熱播、本季新番、標籤篩選、關鍵字搜尋與我的最愛等功能。所有 API 與封面圖下載均透過 QRunnable + QThreadPool 在背景執行緒處理,搭配執行緒安全的限流重試、磁碟圖片快取(7 天 TTL)與本機 JSON 收藏持久化,UI 全程不卡頓。
projects.descEn: Integrates both the mobile and web APIs of Bahamut Anime Crazy to offer trending titles, seasonal lineups, tag filtering, keyword search, and a favorites list. All API calls and cover-image downloads run on background threads via QRunnable + QThreadPool, paired with thread-safe rate-limited retries, a disk image cache (7-day TTL), and local JSON persistence for favorites, keeping the UI responsive throughout.

highlights.zh: 以 QRunnable + QThreadPool 將所有 API 與圖片下載移至背景執行緒,圖片以 bytes 跨執行緒傳遞、QPixmap 僅在主執行緒建立,確保 UI 不阻塞。
highlights.en: Moves all API and image work to background threads via QRunnable + QThreadPool, passing images as raw bytes across threads and constructing QPixmap only on the main thread to keep the UI unblocked.

highlights.zh: 執行緒安全的 API 客戶端:以 Lock 序列化請求並強制 1 秒冷卻、失敗 3 次指數退避重試;在官方 v2 端點失效後改以 v3 與 web API 取得替代內容。
highlights.en: Thread-safe API client that serializes requests with a lock, enforces a 1s cooldown and 3x exponential-backoff retries, and falls back to v3 plus the web API after the official v2 endpoint stopped working.

projects.challengesZh: 官方 mobile v2/list.php 回傳「APP版本過舊」而失效,改以 v3/index.php 各分區與 web API 拼湊出等效的分類與標籤篩選內容;評分需於詳情載入後才取得,因此設計評分快取機制,讓卡片評分在切換頁面後仍能保留。
projects.challengesEn: The official mobile v2/list.php endpoint returned an outdated-version error, so categories and tag filtering were reconstructed from v3/index.php sections plus the web API; scores are only available after loading detail, so a score-cache mechanism was designed to persist card ratings across page switches.

demoFeasibility.notes: PyQt6 原生 Windows 桌面 GUI,需在本機執行(python main.py 或打包的 .exe),無法在瀏覽器跑成 live demo。應以截圖或錄影方式於 showcase 呈現。

projects.oneLinerZh: 在 Gazebo/RViz 模擬中用 OpenCV 偵測紅球、以 ROS 服務驅動 TurtleBot 追球的雙節點機器人專案。
projects.oneLinerEn: A two-node ROS robot that detects a red ball with OpenCV and chases it via a ROS service, simulated in Gazebo/RViz.
projects.descZh: 以 ROS 實作的雙節點架構:影像節點訂閱 TurtleBot3 (waffle_pi) 相機影像,透過 cv_bridge 轉為 OpenCV 格式,以 HSV 雙區間遮罩與 medianBlur 偵測紅球並計算質心。驅動節點作為自訂 DriveToTarget 服務的伺服端,依球體在畫面中的水平位置(左/中/右三分區)發布 cmd_vel 的 Twist 速度指令,使機器人轉向或前進追球。中原大學 ROS 智慧機器人系統概論課程專案。
projects.descEn: A two-node ROS package: the perception node subscribes to the TurtleBot3 (waffle_pi) camera, converts frames via cv_bridge to OpenCV, and locates a red ball using dual-range HSV masking plus median blur to compute its centroid. The driver node acts as the server of a custom DriveToTarget service, mapping the ball's horizontal position (left/center/right thirds) to cmd_vel Twist commands so the robot turns or advances to chase it. Built for a robotics course at Chung Yuan Christian University.

demoFeasibility.notes: 無法作為瀏覽器 live demo。此專案依賴 ROS (rospy)、Gazebo/RViz 模擬環境、TurtleBot3 模型與 cv_bridge/OpenCV,需在 Linux 上完整安裝 ROS 工具鏈並 catkin_make 編譯後執行,無前端或可靜態部署的部分。建議以截圖(repo 內附結果圖)或錄影呈現。

highlights.zh: 雙節點 + 自訂 service 設計:感知與控制職責分離,以 DriveToTarget.srv 定義介面(球座標、影像寬高)。
highlights.en: Two-node design with a custom DriveToTarget service that cleanly separates perception from control via a defined interface (ball coords, image dimensions).

highlights.zh: 以 HSV 雙紅色區間遮罩 + medianBlur 處理紅色在色相環兩端的偵測問題,再取輪廓質心定位球體。
highlights.en: Handles red's wrap-around in HSV by combining two hue-range masks with median blur, then locates the ball via contour centroid.

projects.challengesZh: 紅色在 HSV 色相環橫跨兩端,需用兩組區間遮罩再合併才能穩定偵測;追球策略採簡化的三分區比例控制(left/center/right),易於實作但屬開關式而非連續比例控制。
projects.challengesEn: Red spans both ends of the HSV hue wheel, requiring two merged masks for reliable detection; the chase logic uses a simplified three-zone (left/center/right) scheme that is easy to implement but bang-bang rather than continuous proportional control.

projects.titleZh: Julia Set 動畫 (ARM 組合語言)
projects.oneLinerZh: 以手寫 ARM 組合語言計算 Julia Set 碎形,直寫 Linux framebuffer 產生即時動畫。
projects.oneLinerEn: Hand-written ARM assembly that computes the Julia Set fractal and renders an animation by writing directly to the Linux framebuffer.
projects.descZh: 中原大學「組合語言與嵌入式系統」期末小組專案。核心碎形迭代以純手寫 ARM 組合語言實作,搭配 C 主程式透過 /dev/fb0 將 RGB565 影格直接寫入 Linux framebuffer 形成連續動畫。著重於暫存器配置、整數定點運算(以 __aeabi_idiv 做軟體除法)與二維陣列位址計算等底層細節。
projects.descEn: Final group project for the Assembly Language & Embedded Systems course at CYCU. The fractal iteration is implemented in hand-written ARM assembly, paired with a C driver that streams RGB565 frames straight to the Linux framebuffer (/dev/fb0) to produce a continuous animation. Emphasizes low-level concerns such as register allocation, integer fixed-point math (software division via __aeabi_idiv), and 2D array address computation.

demoFeasibility.notes: 無法作為 live demo。程式需在 ARM 環境(實機或模擬器)執行,且仰賴 Linux framebuffer 裝置 /dev/fb0 直接輸出影像,無法在瀏覽器或純前端環境中運行;成果僅能以 README 中的截圖呈現。

projects.titleZh: Multi-Process vs Thread 排序效能分析
projects.titleEn: Multi-Process vs Thread Sorting Performance Analysis
projects.oneLinerZh: 作業系統課程專案:用 C++ 比較多行程(fork)與多執行緒(std::thread)在平行排序下的效能差異。
projects.oneLinerEn: An OS course project comparing multi-process (fork) vs multi-thread (std::thread) performance for parallel sorting in C++.
projects.descZh: 作業系統課程作業,以 C++ 實作四種排序策略並比較其效能:單行程基準、序列切割合併、以 fork() 多行程搭配 System V 共享記憶體(shmget/shmat)做 IPC,以及 std::thread 多執行緒。透過調整資料切割份數(N 值)量測 CPU 時間,實證探討多行程與多執行緒在泡沫排序與合併排序上的取捨。
projects.descEn: An OS course assignment implementing and benchmarking four sorting strategies in C++: a single-process baseline, sequential split-and-merge, multi-process parallelism via fork() with System V shared memory (shmget/shmat) for IPC, and multi-thread parallelism via std::thread. It measures CPU time across varying data-partition counts (N) to empirically study the trade-offs between processes and threads for bubble sort and merge sort.

highlights.zh: 同時實作行程版(fork + 共享記憶體 IPC)與執行緒版(std::thread)的平行排序,涵蓋切割排序與合併兩階段,直接對照兩種並行模型。
highlights.en: Implements both process-based (fork + shared-memory IPC) and thread-based (std::thread) parallel sorting across the partition and merge phases, giving a direct head-to-head of the two concurrency models.

projects.challengesZh: 多行程版需自行管理 System V 共享記憶體生命週期(shmget/shmat/shmdt/shmctl)與 fork/waitpid 同步,將子行程排序結果跨行程傳回父行程,是相對於執行緒共享位址空間的主要成本來源。
projects.challengesEn: The process variant requires manually managing the System V shared-memory lifecycle (shmget/shmat/shmdt/shmctl) and fork/waitpid synchronization to pass child sort results back across process boundaries — the key cost versus threads that share an address space.

demoFeasibility.notes: 純命令列 C++ 程式,依賴 Linux-only 系統呼叫(sys/shm.h、sys/wait.h、unistd.h、fork),需在 WSL/Ubuntu 編譯執行,無前端介面。不適合作為瀏覽器 live demo;適合以程式碼與隨附 PDF 報告(含效能圖表)作為學術型展示。

projects.titleZh: 類 C 語言直譯器
projects.oneLinerZh: 手刻的類 C 語言直譯器,從 tokenizer、遞迴下降剖析到求值全程自製,並區分詞法/語法/語意三類錯誤。
