projects.oneLinerEn: A hand-written C-like language interpreter built from scratch — tokenizer, recursive-descent parser, and evaluator — that distinguishes lexical, syntactic, and semantic errors.
projects.descZh: 中原大學程式語言課程 Project 2:以 C++ 從零實作一款類 C 語言直譯器,涵蓋自製詞法分析器、遞迴下降剖析器與符號表,支援變數/函式/陣列宣告、運算式、條件與迴圈。採兩階段設計——先完整檢查文法、把正確語句存下,第二遍才執行求值——並透過自訂例外類別分別回報詞法錯誤(不合法 token)、語法錯誤與語意錯誤(使用未宣告變數),同時標示出錯行號。
projects.descEn: Programming Languages course Project 2 (CYCU): a C-like language interpreter written from scratch in C++, with a hand-rolled lexer, recursive-descent parser, and symbol table supporting variable/function/array declarations, expressions, conditionals, and loops. It uses a two-pass design — first fully validating grammar and storing valid statements, then evaluating on the second pass — and reports lexical (illegal tokens), syntactic, and semantic (undeclared-variable) errors separately via custom exception classes, each with the offending line number.

highlights.zh: 手刻整條前端管線:詞法分析(含 >=、>> 等多字元運算子)、遞迴下降剖析器、符號表,未依賴任何 parser generator。
highlights.en: Entire front-end hand-written: lexer (incl. multi-char operators like >= and >>), recursive-descent parser, and symbol table — no parser generator used.

highlights.zh: 明確區分三類錯誤——詞法(不合法 token)、語法、語意(呼叫未宣告變數),並以自訂例外類別搭配出錯行號回報。
highlights.en: Cleanly separates three error classes — lexical (illegal tokens), syntactic, and semantic (undeclared identifiers) — reported via custom exceptions with line numbers.

highlights.zh: 兩階段執行模型:先完整驗證文法並存下正確語句,第二遍才求值,而非邊剖析邊執行。
highlights.en: Two-pass execution model: fully validate and store valid statements first, then evaluate on a second pass rather than interpreting inline.

projects.challengesZh: 在沒有 parser generator 的前提下,手動處理多字元運算子的最長匹配、數字 token 中小數點的判別,以及在符號表中同時管理變數與函式的型別與內容。README 註明第二次驗收最後一題未通過,推測為 ListFunction 輸出格式問題。
projects.challengesEn: Without a parser generator, manually handling longest-match for multi-char operators, decimal-point disambiguation in numeric tokens, and managing both variable and function types/contents in one symbol table. The README notes the final test case in the second review failed, likely due to a ListFunction output formatting issue.

demoFeasibility.notes: 純 C++ 命令列程式,透過 stdin 讀取程式碼、stdout 輸出結果(repo 內附 input.txt / output.txt),無任何前端或可靜態部署的介面,無法作為瀏覽器 live demo。若要展示需編譯後在終端機執行,或另行包裝為 WebAssembly,但專案本身不含此能力。

projects.oneLinerZh: 以 C++ 實作的 Two-pass 組譯器,可將 SIC 與 SIC/XE 組合語言翻譯成 Object Code。
projects.oneLinerEn: A C++ two-pass assembler that translates SIC and SIC/XE assembly into object code.
projects.descZh: 中原大學系統程式課程作業:以 C++ 實作能同時處理 SIC 與 SIC/XE 兩種架構的交叉組譯器,採 Lexer / Table / Assembler 三個類別分工,經 Two-pass 流程完成符號表建立與機器碼產生。Pass 1 記錄各指令位置與符號位址並檢測重複定義,Pass 2 處理各類 Pseudo 指令(START、BYTE、WORD、RESB/RESW、EQU、BASE、LTORG 等)、計算相對定址 disp,並依 Format 2/3/4 與立即/間接定址產生最終 Object Code。
projects.descEn: A systems-programming course project (Chung Yuan Christian University) implementing a cross assembler that handles both SIC and SIC/XE architectures in C++. It splits responsibilities across Lexer / Table / Assembler classes and runs a two-pass flow for symbol resolution and code generation: Pass 1 records instruction locations and symbol addresses (detecting duplicate definitions); Pass 2 handles pseudo-instructions (START, BYTE, WORD, RESB/RESW, EQU, BASE, LTORG, etc.), computes relative-addressing displacements, and emits object code across Format 2/3/4 with immediate and indirect addressing.

highlights.zh: Lexer / Table / Assembler 三類別分工,搭配 Symbol Table 與 Literal Table 等七張表管理組譯狀態
highlights.en: Three-class design (Lexer / Table / Assembler) backed by seven tables including symbol and literal tables to manage assembly state

highlights.zh: 完整的定址模式處理:Format 2/3/4、PC/Base 相對定址、立即(#)與間接(@)定址,並支援 EQU 兩符號加減運算
highlights.en: Full addressing-mode handling: Format 2/3/4, PC/Base relative addressing, immediate (#) and indirect (@) modes, plus EQU two-symbol arithmetic

projects.challengesZh: README 誠實記錄了已知限制:多重 literal 與 EQU 並存時 object code 偶有少 3 的情形,且 EQU 後方若含乘除或多運算元的算式、以及括號運算尚未支援,反映出組譯器相對定址與運算式求值的實作邊界。
projects.challengesEn: The README honestly documents known limits: object code can occasionally be short by 3 when multiple literals and EQUs coexist, and EQU expressions involving multiplication/division, multiple operands, or parentheses are not yet supported — reflecting the practical edges of relative-addressing and expression evaluation in an assembler.

demoFeasibility.notes: 純命令列 C++ 程式,以 Dev-C++ / MSVC 編譯為 Windows .exe,透過標準輸入輸出讀寫 .txt 檔案,無任何前端或網頁介面,無法作為瀏覽器 live demo。如需展示,僅能以原始碼、輸入/輸出 .txt 範例與 README 中的結果截圖呈現。

projects.titleZh: 流水線 MIPS-Lite CPU 設計
projects.oneLinerZh: 用 Verilog 從零打造的五級流水線 MIPS-Lite CPU,可執行 13 道 MIPS 指令。
projects.oneLinerEn: A five-stage pipelined MIPS-Lite CPU built from scratch in Verilog, executing 13 MIPS instructions.
projects.descZh: 計算機組織課程團隊專案,以 Verilog 實作一顆可執行 13 道 MIPS 指令的五級流水線(IF/ID/EX/MEM/WB)CPU,並用 Icarus Verilog 模擬驗證、輸出波形觀察。資料路徑包含 ALU、自製乘法器(MULTU 搭配 Hi/Lo 暫存器)、以位移級串接而成的桶式位移器,以及四組流水線暫存器。Terry 主要負責乘法器與架構圖,並協助位移器與波形驗證。
projects.descEn: A computer-organization course team project implementing a five-stage pipelined (IF/ID/EX/MEM/WB) MIPS-Lite CPU in Verilog that executes 13 MIPS instructions, verified via Icarus Verilog simulation and waveform inspection. The datapath includes the ALU, a hand-built multiplier (MULTU with Hi/Lo registers), a barrel shifter composed of cascaded shift stages, and four pipeline registers. Terry primarily built the multiplier and architecture diagrams, and assisted with the shifter and waveform verification.

demoFeasibility.notes: 純 Verilog RTL 硬體模擬專案,需以 Icarus Verilog 等 HDL 工具編譯與跑模擬(repo 內含 .vvp 編譯產物與 .vcd 波形檔),無前端、無法獨立靜態部署。不適合作為瀏覽器 live demo;若要展示,較合適的方式是放架構圖與波形截圖。

projects.challengesZh: 在團隊分工下整合 ALU、乘法器、桶式位移器與多級流水線暫存器,並透過波形比對驗證跨級資料傳遞與控制訊號的正確性。
projects.challengesEn: Integrating the ALU, multiplier, barrel shifter, and multi-stage pipeline registers under a team division of labor, and validating cross-stage data flow and control signals through waveform comparison.

highlights.zh: 五級流水線資料路徑:以 IF_ID / ID_EX / EX_MEM / MEM_WB 四組暫存器串接 IF/ID/EX/MEM/WB 五個階段。
highlights.en: Five-stage pipelined datapath with IF_ID / ID_EX / EX_MEM / MEM_WB registers connecting the IF/ID/EX/MEM/WB stages.

highlights.zh: 自製運算單元:MULTU 乘法器搭配 Hi/Lo 暫存器,以及由 SLL1/2/4/8/16 串接而成的桶式位移器。
highlights.en: Custom compute units: a MULTU multiplier with Hi/Lo registers, and a barrel shifter built from cascaded SLL1/2/4/8/16 stages.

highlights.zh: 以 Icarus Verilog 編譯模擬並產生 VCD 波形,驗證 13 道 MIPS 指令的執行正確性。
highlights.en: Compiled and simulated with Icarus Verilog, producing VCD waveforms to verify correct execution of all 13 MIPS instructions.

projects.oneLinerZh: 以 Verilog 有限狀態機模擬車站自動售票機的購票與找零流程。
projects.oneLinerEn: A station ticket vending machine modeled as a Verilog finite state machine.
projects.descZh: 課程作業:用 Verilog 將車站自動售票機建模為四狀態有限狀態機(選站算票價、計算總額、逐枚投幣累計、出票找零並重置)。支援 5 站起訖選擇(同站即月台票)、1~5 張票數,與 1/5/10/50 元逐枚投幣,投入金額不足時顯示尚需金額,足額後輸出找零與票數。
projects.descEn: A coursework project that models a station ticket vending machine as a four-state Verilog FSM (fare calculation, total cost, coin-by-coin accumulation, then dispense change and reset). It supports origin/destination selection across 5 stations (same station = platform ticket), 1-5 tickets, and one-at-a-time 1/5/10/50-dollar coins, printing the remaining amount due when underpaid and the change plus ticket count once fully paid.

demoFeasibility.notes: 純 RTL 硬體描述(單一 vending_machine_x.v),靠 $display 在模擬器輸出結果,無任何前端或可獨立靜態部署的程式碼。需以 Verilog 模擬器(如 Icarus Verilog / ModelSim)搭配 testbench 跑波形或文字輸出,無法作為瀏覽器 live demo 候選。
